title: Video Editor (Short-Form + Podcast Content)
description:
Remote | Part-Time to Start (Opportunity to Grow)



We’re looking for a video editor who understands more than just cutting clips.



This role is for someone who can take long-form conversations and turn them into sharp, engaging content that actually holds attention and communicates something meaningful.



Most of our content comes from podcast-style interviews with business owners, founders, and high-level professionals. The goal isn’t just views — it’s positioning, clarity, and impact.



What You’ll Be Working On:



Editing short-form clips (30–90 seconds) from podcast recordings



Pulling out strong moments, insights, and narrative flow



Adding clean captions, pacing, and subtle visual elements



Structuring clips so they feel intentional, not random



Occasional longer-form edits (full episodes or segments)



What We’re Looking For:



Strong sense of timing, pacing, and storytelling



Experience with short-form content (Reels, TikTok, LinkedIn clips, YouTube Shorts)



Ability to identify what actually makes a clip worth watching



Clean, modern editing style (not over-edited or gimmicky)



Reliable turnaround and communication



Bonus (Not Required, but Valuable):



Experience editing podcast or interview content



Understanding of business/educational content



Ability to suggest which clips to use (not just edit what’s given)

2–3 examples of short-form content you’ve edited



A brief note on how you decide what makes a good clip



Your availability + turnaround time

title: Seo Specialist
description:
About Us



NGD Media is an online advertising company looking for a dedicated and experienced Local SEO Specialist to join our team. We focus on delivering top-tier results for our clients, and we need an expert who knows how to move the needle when it comes to local search visibility.



The Role



We are seeking a skilled Local SEO Specialist whose primary focus will be managing and optimizing Google My Business (GMB) profiles for our clients. In this part-time role, you will be responsible for executing local SEO strategies that drive measurable improvements in local search rankings and visibility.



Key Responsibilities



•

Optimize and manage Google My Business (GMB) profiles for various clients.



•

Implement effective local SEO strategies to improve map pack rankings and organic local search visibility.



•

Monitor, track, and report on local SEO performance and GMB metrics.



•

Stay up-to-date with the latest Google algorithm updates and local SEO best practices.



Requirements



•

Proven experience in SEO, specifically focusing on Local SEO and Google My Business (GMB) optimization.



•

Ability to demonstrate past success in improving local search rankings.



•

Strong understanding of local search ranking factors and online advertising principles.



•

Excellent communication skills and a proactive approach to problem-solving.



•

Reliable internet connection and the ability to work independently.



Compensation & Benefits



•

Hourly Rate: $7.00 per hour



•

Bonuses: Performance-based bonuses available



•

Trial Period: Candidates who pass the initial screening will be given paid trial tasks to prove their abilities.



How to Apply



To apply for this position, you must submit a Loom video. Applications without a Loom video will not be considered.



In your Loom video, please include the following:



1.

A brief introduction of yourself and your background in SEO.



2.

A walkthrough showing your past experience with Local SEO.



3.

Screen shares of local SEO dashboards demonstrating how you have successfully improved GMB performance and rankings over time for previous clients or projects.



We look forward to reviewing your application and seeing your proven results!

title: E-commerce Order Fulfillment Specialist (Amazon & eBay)
description:
Are you a meticulous, detail-oriented professional looking for a long-term career? We are looking for a dedicated Order Fulfillment Specialist in the Philippines to join our growing team.



If you take pride in your work, never leave a task unfinished, and thrive in a fast-paced environment, we want to talk to you!



1. What We Are Looking For:

? Rockstar Responsibility: You treat our business like your own. You don’t need someone breathing down your neck to get things done correctly and on time.

? Attention to Detail: You double-check everything. "Good enough" is not in your vocabulary—accuracy is your priority.

? Fast Learner: You can quickly master Amazon, eBay, and our fulfillment workflows.

? Reliability: We need someone who shows up every day. Frequent unscheduled absences are a deal-breaker.

? Schedule: You must be able to work during US Business Hours (Night shift in the

Philippines).





2. Key Responsibilities:

? Process and fulfill orders accurately on Amazon and eBay platforms. Coordinate with the team to ensure all daily tasks are completed before the end of your shift.

? Maintain a high level of accuracy to minimize returns and customer complaints.





3. Requirements:

? Proven experience with Amazon and eBay order management.

? Stable internet connection and a reliable backup power source (essential).

? Excellent written English skills. 

? Commitment to a long-term, stable working relationship.



4. Why Join Us?

? Stable, long-term employment (we are not looking for short-term freelancers).

? Competitive salary based on experience and performance.

? Respectful and supportive management.

title: Launch & Campaign Marketing Specialist
description:
About the Business



Intentional Travelers is an online education business that helps independent travelers plan their own meaningful trips and travel smarter.



Through our website 
, we provide:

- Travel planning tutorials and online courses

- The Intentional Travelers Toolkit membership

- A free
 newsletter and blog

- The annual DIY Trip Summit (an online conference for independent travelers featuring 30+ travel experts)



Our mission is to help travelers cut through overwhelming information online and make confident decisions about their trips. We focus on practical guidance from our own real-world experience, helping people travel smarter with simple tools - even if they didn’t grow up with today’s technology.



We’re a married couple who have run online businesses since 2014 and have experience in managing remote team members, including one VA that has been with us since 2020. We hope to find a valuable partnership with someone who can commit to at least a year or two part-time. 



About the Role



We are seeking a part-time marketing specialist who can help plan and execute promotional campaigns for our membership and virtual events.



This role focuses on marketing strategy, campaign planning, and promotional copywriting.



You will collaborate directly with the founder to plan marketing campaigns and events, then take ownership of executing those campaigns across
 and sales funnels.



The ideal person enjoys thinking strategically about promotions, understands customer psychology, can translate ideas into effective marketing copy and systems, and uses basic campaign data to test and improve promotions.



What Success Looks Like



Your primary responsibility will be helping plan and execute quarterly promotional campaigns that drive membership sales.

This includes promotions connected to:

- The annual DIY Trip Summit

- Smaller virtual events or workshops related to our course content

-
 course promotions that drive Toolkit membership sales



Over time, this role may expand into evergreen
 funnels, additional promotional campaigns, or other online platforms if it’s a strong fit.



Success in this role means:

- Marketing campaigns are well organized and executed smoothly

- Promotional messaging resonates with our audience

- Campaigns generate consistent membership sales

- Our marketing systems become easier to run and improve over time



Responsibilities



Your work will include a mix of campaign execution, system improvements, and ongoing optimization. 



A. Campaign Strategy & Planning



Work with the founder to plan promotional campaigns including:

- Quarterly course/membership promotions

- DIY Trip Summit marketing



During monthly planning calls you may:

- Review past campaign results

- Brainstorm promotional ideas together

- Help shape messaging and angles

- Plan campaign timelines



You will be expected to propose ideas and improvements, while the founder retains final decision authority.



B. Campaign Execution



Once campaigns are approved, you will execute much of the marketing work, including:

- Drafting or refining promotional
 sequences

- Updating sales pages

- Optimizing
 funnels

- Scheduling
 campaigns

- Other implementation tasks



C. Copywriting



A key part of this role is writing clear, persuasive marketing copy.

Typical copy projects include:

- Promotional
s

- Launch
 sequences

- Sales page updates

- Opt-in pages and funnel messaging



Our brand voice is practical, encouraging, and educational. We avoid hype and focus on helping travelers make better decisions. Our audience is primarily mature independent travelers from North America who value practical, trustworthy guidance and are not necessarily digital natives.



D. Funnel Improvements



When there is no active promotion, your focus will shift to improving existing marketing systems, which may include:

-
 funnels

- Promotion calendars

- Campaign messaging

- Offer positioning

- Ad campaigns

- Affiliate collaborations



Work Structure



This is a part-time remote position.



- Start with approximately 8-10 hours per week

- Opportunity to increase hours over time if it’s a good fit



We will typically have one or two planning calls per month to check in about marketing plans and campaign performance.

Most work can be completed independently between those meetings.



Required Skills



Strong candidates will demonstrate:

- Strategic copywriting ability

- Understanding of customer psychology

- Experience with optimizing online marketing campaigns or product launches

- Strong written English

- Ability to work independently and manage projects

- Willingness to learn new tools and systems

- Honesty and not afraid to ask questions 

- Initiative to analyze relevant data and generate new ideas and projects

- Clear communication and reliability



Other Requirements

- Available approximately 10 hours per week

- Reliable computer and internet



Nice to Have

Experience with any of the following is helpful but not required:

-
 marketing platforms (ConvertKit / Kit or similar)

- Sales page platforms (Thrivecart or similar)

- AirTable databases

- Basic website editing (Wordpress and Squarespace)

- Search Engine Optimization

- Funnel planning

- Online course businesses 

- Affiliate programs

- Virtual summits

- Digital product launches

- International travel



We can train the right person on our specific tools and systems.



Benefits



- Flexibility! Most of the work can be done any time that’s convenient for you.

- Opportunity to learn about travel around the world and online entrepreneurship

- If there are particular skills you’d like to develop, we’ll try to work that into your job.

- Hourly pay based on experience (starting around $5 - $10 USD / hr)

- Potential performance bonuses tied to successful campaigns.

- We make 13th month payments for those in good standing.

- Opportunity to increase hours and responsibility over time, if desired.



We reward reliable, long-standing workers as you grow into a key role on our team.



To Apply



Please message with the subject line: Applying for Marketing Specialist – Intentional Travelers



At the top of your message include:

- 2–3 sentences about why this position interests you

- One example of a marketing campaign, launch, or
 promotion you have worked on

- What is one marketing angle you would test to promote a travel planning membership for North Americans age 50+? 

*Please do not generate responses with A.I., we want to see your own thoughts and writing ability.*



Shortlisted candidates will be invited to complete written interview questions by April 15. Final candidates will be invited to a Zoom interview. New hire will have a fully paid 1 month probation period, including paid training.

title: Construction Estimator
description:
Construction Estimator (Concrete, Masonry & Building Envelope Specialist)



We are hiring a full-time Construction Estimator specializing in concrete, masonry (brick, CMU, stone, stucco), drywall, openings, roofing, and siding. This role focuses on accurate takeoffs, cost estimation, and bid management for residential and commercial projects.



Key Responsibilities

Perform quantity takeoffs for concrete, masonry, drywall, openings, roofing, and siding

Request supplier quotes (e.g., rebar, masonry, roofing materials)

Estimate labor, materials, and equipment costs

Prepare scopes of work and submit bids

Assist with scheduling and budget analysis



Requirements:

Proven experience in Division 3 (Concrete), Division 4 (Masonry), Division 9 (Drywall), Division 7 (Roofing/Siding), and Openings

Strong knowledge of construction drawings, takeoffs, and cost estimation

Proficient in PlanSwift (required)

Experience with JobTread or similar tools

Strong English communication skills

Detail-oriented and able to manage multiple deadlines



Tools:

PlanSwift & JobTread

Stack and AI tools (a plus)

Work Details

Full-time (40 hrs/week), remote

Monday–Friday, 7 AM–4 PM (Central Time)

Important



Candidates must have multi-trade estimating experience across structural and architectural scopes.

title: Executive Assistant & Customer Success Specialist (SaaS)
description:
Job Title: Executive Assistant and Customer Success Specialist (SaaS)



- Location: Remote (Work from Home)

- Type: Full-Time (40 hours/week)

- Salary: $7.00 – $8.00 USD/hour (Negotiable based on experience)

- Experience: Minimum 2+ years in a similar role



The Role:

We are looking for a high-energy, tech-savvy Executive Assistant to become the right hand to our company founder and the face of our customer service. This isn't just an admin role; you will own the entire customer experience for our software, bridging the gap between our users and our development team.



You must be fluent in English, professional on camera, and possess the tech-intuition to learn new software inside and out within days, not weeks.



Key Responsibilities:

- Customer Success and Support: Take full ownership of the software’s customer service. Resolve tickets, engage with users, and ensure a world-class experience.

- Client Interface: Jump on Zoom calls with clients to provide support, demos, or troubleshooting with confidence and a likable personality.

- Bridge to Dev Team: Identify, document, and report bugs to our tech team. You will be the translator between user feedback and technical fixes.

- Documentation and SOPs: You are an organization wizard. You will create and maintain Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) and keep our FAQs/Help Center updated and easy to navigate.

- Executive Support: Manage schedules and administrative tasks for the Lead Hacker to ensure maximum efficiency.



Requirements:

- 2+ Years Experience in an EA or Customer Success role (SaaS experience is a major bonus).

- Perfect English: Exceptional verbal and written communication skills are non-negotiable.

- Tech-Fluent: You understand how software works and can talk to developers without getting lost.

- Hyper-Organized: You find joy in documentation, clean folders, and efficient workflows.

- Professional Presence: You are well-presented and personable on video calls.

- Quick Learner: You can grasp complex software features rapidly.

- Bonus Points If... 

     You have a background in Project Management.

     You have previously worked for a SaaS startup.

     You have experience with tools like Slack, Jira, Notion, or Zendesk.



Why Join Us?

- Immediate start for the right candidate.

- Stable, long-term full-time employment.

- Opportunity to work closely with a Lead Hacker and grow within a tech-driven environment.



How to Apply:

- Please send your resume along with a brief (1-2 minute) Loom video introducing yourself. We want to see your personality and hear your English fluency.

- Note: Applications without a video or a personalized cover letter will not be considered.

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview: 



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office. 



 

Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents. 



 

About Power Plus Systems: 



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission. 



 

Objectives: 

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.



 

Competencies: 

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.



 

Equipment Requirements:  

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.



 

Physical Requirements: 

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.

 

Benefits: 

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply: 



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below. 




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply. 



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Sales Closer – US Hours | Warm, Prequalified Leads | Build Income Through Skill
description:
If you’re a closer who’s tired of chasing bad leads, starting from zero every call, or working in roles with no real upside—this is what you’ve been looking for.



At Acquisition Ascension, we’re hiring a Sales Closer to work exclusively with warm, prequalified prospects. These are people who have already shown interest, gone through a qualification process, and are ready for a real conversation.



Your role isn’t to convince strangers.

It’s to guide interested prospects to a clear decision—professionally, confidently, and honestly.



This is a role for someone who sees sales as a craft, not a grind.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Running scheduled sales calls with warm, prequalified leads

Leading structured conversations using proven frameworks

Understanding client needs and positioning the right solution

Handling objections with calm confidence

Closing deals and documenting outcomes in the CRM

Showing up consistently during US time zones



Why Closers Choose This Role:

You’re not prospecting or cold calling

You’re working with people who want the conversation

You’re paid through a base + commission structure

You have clarity on the offer, the process, and expectations

You’re building long-term income through skill, not luck

You’re part of a system designed to support performance



Compensation:

Base pay + commissions



This Role Is a Strong Fit If You:

Speak fluent, professional English

Have experience closing sales calls (services, agency, coaching, or similar)

Are comfortable working US hours

Enjoy leading conversations and asking for commitment

Take ownership of your performance and results

Want a role with stability and upside



How to Apply:

Send a short Loom video (1–2 minutes) covering:



Your background and closing experience

Your availability during US time zones

Why this role aligns with what you want long term



We’re hiring one closer for this position.

If you want clean leads, a clear process, and a role where your skill directly determines your income—apply now.



— Pranav

Acquisition Ascension

title: Client Support VA (Client-Facing) – Check-In Calls & Ongoing Support
description:
At Acquisition Ascension, supporting our clients properly matters just as much as delivering results.



We’re hiring a Client Support VA to act as a consistent, client-facing support point after onboarding. Your role is to help clients stay informed, supported, and on track through regular check-in calls and clear communication.



This is a customer support–style role with live calls — not sales, not closing. If you’re calm, organized, and comfortable speaking with clients, this role is built for you.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Run scheduled client check-in calls using provided agendas

Support clients with questions, updates, and next steps

Track client progress, notes, and follow-ups

Maintain accurate records in CRM / tracking tools

Escalate issues internally when needed

Ensure clients feel supported and informed at all times



What You’ll Get:

Clear scripts, call frameworks, and SOPs

A stable, long-term support role

Direct collaboration with internal delivery teams

A position built on trust, consistency, and reliability



You’re a Good Fit If You:

Speak fluent, professional English and are comfortable on calls

Have experience in customer support, client support, VA work, or account support

Are patient, organized, and good at follow-ups

Can manage multiple clients without losing details

Communicate clearly and calmly

Enjoy helping clients feel supported and reassured



How to Apply:

Send a short Loom video (1–2 minutes) answering:



Your background in client or customer support

Your experience handling calls or check-ins

Why you’re suited for a client support role with live calls



We’re hiring one Client Support VA for this position.

If you enjoy helping clients, keeping communication clear, and being a steady support presence — apply now.

title: Warm Caller – US Hours | Base + Commission | Opt-In Leads Only
description:
We’re hiring a Warm Caller at Acquisition Ascension to speak with leads who have already requested a call.



These are not random cold dials.

Every person you speak with has opted in and wants to be contacted.



Your role is to follow up professionally, guide the conversation using our scripts, and book qualified appointments.



You’ll be working US time zones, approximately 2–3 hours per day, with clear expectations around responsiveness and execution.



Your Responsibilities:

Call warm, opt-in leads who have requested a callback

Follow proven scripts to qualify and schedule appointments

Maintain accurate notes and call outcomes in the CRM

Confirm details and ensure strong show-up rates

Communicate consistently with the team during US hours



What You’ll Get:

Base pay + commission structure

Scripts, CRM, dialer, and training fully provided

Ongoing feedback and performance tracking

A structured role with consistency and long-term potential



You’re a Good Fit If You:

Speak fluent English with a clear, confident phone presence

Have experience in warm calling, appointment setting, or sales (preferred)

Are comfortable working US time zones

Can consistently commit to 3–4 hours per day



Are reliable, organized, and follow systems without micromanagement



How to Apply:

Send a short Loom (1–2 mins) answering:



Who are you and what’s your calling experience?

Are you comfortable working US hours daily?

Why do you believe you’re a good fit for a warm-lead calling role?



We’re hiring one warm caller for this position.

If you prefer speaking with people who already want the call—and getting paid for consistency—apply now.



— Pranav

Acquisition Ascension

title: Virtual Assistant for AI Digital Marketing Agency
description:
We are Scaling Edge, an AI-first business development agency based in London. We help ambitious companies grow through paid advertising, AI-powered lead generation, and automation systems. We're growing fast and we need a sharp, reliable VA to work directly alongside our team on live client campaigns and internal operations.



This is not a task-monkey role. We need someone who thinks, communicates clearly, and takes ownership of their work. If you are the kind of person who reads a brief twice before acting, catches your own mistakes before they become problems, and asks the right questions when something is unclear, we want to hear from you.



---



**What You'll Be Working On**



Day-to-day tasks will vary but will regularly include:



- Supporting live lead generation campaigns (LinkedIn outreach,
 sequences, WhatsApp follow-up)

- Assisting with social media content scheduling, management, and reporting

- Working inside AI tools to support content creation, research, and workflow automation

- Helping manage and update CRM records (GoHighLevel)

- Supporting Meta Ads Manager tasks (creative uploads, campaign monitoring, basic reporting)

- Administrative and coordination tasks across client accounts

- Light copywriting and content drafting using AI tools and brand guidelines



---



**Ideal Skills and Experience**



We are not expecting a unicorn. Training will be provided on our internal systems and processes. That said, the stronger your existing foundation, the faster you will hit the ground running.



Highly desirable:



- Hands-on experience with AI tools such as Claude, Manus, and similar platforms

- Understanding of lead generation principles (outbound, nurture, CRM workflows)

- Familiarity with social media marketing and content systems

- Experience with Meta Ads Manager (even at an entry level)

- Experience using GoHighLevel as a CRM or automation platform



What we genuinely value above all else:



- You listen carefully and follow instructions accurately the first time

- You are proactive about flagging issues rather than hiding mistakes

- You have a strong eye for detail and a low error rate

- You communicate clearly and respond promptly during working hours

- You are reliable, consistent, and take your commitments seriously



---



**Logistics**



- Hours: 4 to 6 hours per day (minimum), Monday to Friday

- Timezone: Must have significant overlap with UK hours (GMT/BST)

- Communication: Primarily via Slack and WhatsApp

- Tools: Google Workspace, ClickUp, GoHighLevel, Meta Business Suite, AI platforms



---



**How to Apply**



To be considered, please respond with the following:



1. RECORD A LOOM VIDED ANSWERING THE QUESTIONS BELOW AND WHY I SHOULD HIRE YOU - IF YOU DON'T RECORD A LOOM VIDEO YOUR APPLICATION WILL BE IGNORED



2. List the AI tools you have worked with and briefly describe how you used them

3. Describe a time you caught a mistake in your work before it caused a problem

4. Your availability and current timezone





Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed. We are serious about attention to detail from day one.

A paid test task is required before hiring. Strong performers will get long-term work, more responsibility, and higher pay.

title: Google ads specialist
description:
About NGD Media



NGD Media is a dynamic and rapidly growing marketing agency dedicated to delivering exceptional digital advertising results. With a robust portfolio of over 65 active clients, our agency specializes in driving targeted traffic, maximizing return on ad spend, and scaling businesses across various industries. We foster a fast-paced, results-oriented environment where continuous learning and performance are highly valued. Joining our tea
ans stepping into a role with immediate impact and significant room for long-term professional growth.



Role Overview



We are currently seeking a highly skilled and motivated Google Ads Specialist to join our remote team. This role begins as a part-time, trial-based position designed to evaluate your strategic capabilities and technical proficiency within our existing workflows. Upon successful completion of the trial period, the position will transition into a permanent, full-time role. As a core member of our advertising department, you will be directly responsible for the health, optimization, and structural setup of numerous client accounts. This position is ideal for a proactive professional who thrives on data analysis and enjoys the challenge of scaling multiple campaigns simultaneously.



Key Responsibilities



The primary focus of this role is to ensure that our clients' advertising budgets are utilized efficiently and effectively. You will be tasked with the comprehensive setup of new Google Ads accounts, ensuring that all tracking, conversion actions, and campaign structures align with industry best practices.



Beyond initial setup, continuous optimization is a critical component of your daily routine. You will regularly analyze performance metrics, adjust bidding strategies, refine keyword targeting, and conduct A/B testing on ad copy to improve overall campaign health. Given our extensive client base of over 65 accounts, strong organizational skills are essential to prioritize tasks and allocate your time effectively across different projects. You will also be expected to identify new growth opportunities within existing accounts and implement proactive strategies to decrease cost-per-acquisition while increasing conversion volume.



Qualifications and Requirements



To succeed in this role, candidates must possess a deep understanding of the Google Ads ecosystem, including Search, Display, and Performance Max campaigns. Practical experience in managing multiple accounts simultaneously is highly preferred, as it demonstrates the ability to handle the scale of our agency's operations.



Candidates should demonstrate strong analytical capabilities, with the ability to interpret complex data sets and translate them into actionable optimization strategies. Familiarity with Google Analytics and conversion tracking implementation is also necessary to ensure accurate reporting and attribution. Furthermore, exceptional written and verbal communication skills in English are required to clearly articulate campaign performance and strategic recommendations to our internal team. A proactive mindset, resilience in a fast-paced environment, and a continuous desire to stay updated with the latest digital marketing trends are essential traits for our ideal candidate.



Compensation and Growth Path



We believe in rewarding performance and providing a clear trajectory for career advancement. The position starts at a competitive base rate of $7.00 per hour during the initial part-time trial period. This phase allows both the agency and the specialist to ensure a strong mutual fit in terms of skill and work culture.



As you demonstrate consistent success in optimizing accounts and driving positive results for our clients, there is a structured growth path to increase your compensation up to $10.00 per hour. Concurrently, the role will expand from part-time hours to a full-time commitment, offering long-term stability and the opportunity to take on more senior responsibilities within the NGD Media team.



Application Process



Interested candidates are invited to submit their application with the following required materials:



Resume: Submit a comprehensive resume detailing your specific experience with Google Ads account setup and optimization. Please ensure your resume highlights any experience managing large portfolios of clients or complex campaign structures.



Loom Video (Required): As part of your application, you must submit a brief Loom video (3–5 minutes) that includes the following:



1.

Your Background and Experience: Introduce yourself and provide a brief overview of your professional experience with Google Ads, including the number of accounts you've managed and the types of campaigns you've worked on.



2.

Account Walkthrough: Walk us through a Google Ads account you've personally worked on and optimized. Share specific examples of:



•

The campaign structure and strategy you implemented



•

Key optimizations you made and the results achieved (e.g., improved CTR, reduced CPA, increased conversions)



•

Any challenges you overcame and how you addressed them



•

Your approach to account management and ongoing optimization







To submit your Loom video, record it directly on 
 and include the shareable link in your application
 or submission form.



We look forward to reviewing your qualifications and potentially welcoming you to the NGD Media team.

title: Virtual Assistant for Short Term Rental Management
description:
ABOUT US

We are a fast-growing property management company specializing in short-term rentals on Airbnb and Vrbo. Our mission is to provide exceptional guest experiences while optimizing property performance. We are looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to join our team and support daily operations.



WHAT WE OFFER

- Competitive pay ($500–$750 USD/month PLUS performance-based bonuses)

- Long-term remote work opportunity

- Growth potential within a thriving company



RESPONSIBILITIES

Guest Communication – Respond to inquiries, manage reservations, and provide check-in/out instructions.

Booking & Calendar Management – Oversee property calendars, prevent double bookings, and optimize occupancy.

Operations & Coordination – Schedule cleanings, handle maintenance requests, and resolve guest issues.

Listing & Reputation Management – Keep property listings updated and monitor guest reviews.

Reporting & Software Use – Utilize property management tools (Hospitable, Guesty, etc.) to streamline tasks.



QUALIFICATIONS

2+ years experience in Airbnb property management or a similar role.

Excellent written & spoken English with strong communication skills.

Familiarity with Airbnb, Vrbo, and booking platforms.

Tech-savvy and detail-oriented with experience in automation tools.

HOW TO APPLY

3: Introduction Video (1-3 min): Share:



Your background & experience in Airbnb/short-term rentals

Why you’re the perfect fit for this role

Your favorite Airbnb hosting tip

*Only applicants who follow these steps will be considered!*

title: Landing Page Designer, Conversion Focused
description:
Are you looking for an opportunity to make an incredible impact in the world of socially conscious brands?



Lucyd Media is a social advertising agency, specializing in the compliant advertising for CBD, Cannabis, and other DTC wellness e-commerce brands. Our mission is to reduce human suffering and maximize human potential by facilitating the distribution of Conscious Compounds™



We are currently seeking a strong landing page (LP) designer to lead the design and optimization of the post-click experience across our paid media funnels.



At Lucyd, we believe the post-click experience is one of the biggest underutilized levers in wellness growth. We need someone who can bring real authority to that part of the funnel, move quickly, use AI aggressively, and help us create a more seamless conversion experience across the brands we serve. This role will use AI-assisted tools to rapidly generate and iterate on landing pages, while applying strong design judgment and conversion strategy.



Ready to elevate your career? We're excited to hear from you.



What You Will Be Responsible For:

Designing and optimizing landing pages, offer pages, and funnel-specific product pages

Translating ad hooks and offer strategy into conversion-focused page experiences

Improving what users land on after the click, whether that is a custom landing page, PDP variant, or other post-click experience

Supporting page testing, iteration, and optimization based on performance

Identifying where the current post-click experience is creating friction or hurting conversion

Helping define how landing pages should be requested, built, and improved within Lucyd

Using AI tools to speed up production and increase design leverage

Partnering closely with Growth Strategists, Advertising, and Post-Click teams



What We Are Looking For:

3+ years of experience in CRO-focused design, landing page design, funnel design, or conversion-oriented eCommerce design.

A portfolio demonstrating at least 20 DTC/eCommerce landing pages or product pages (PDPs) you have designed. Candidates without relevant portfolio examples will not be considered.

Experience designing for paid media funnels, not just general web design. You know how to align page structure and messaging to the promise made in the ad.

Comfort using AI tools to generate and iterate on landing page designs quickly, while applying strong design judgment and strategic direction. You know how to use tools to move faster while still applying judgment and taste.

Exceptional organizational skills, adept at juggling multiple projects while maintaining top-notch productivity and prioritization.

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills to manage client expectations and maintain strong relationships.

Experience in DTC wellness supplements, cannabis or other restricted products or adjacent consumer categories is a plus



Success Roadmap:



In 30 Days, You'll:

Audit the current pages users land on after the click, including landing pages, PDPs, collections, and offer pages.

Identify the highest-priority opportunities to improve conversion through better post-click experiences.

Begin improving the process for how landing pages are requested, built, and reviewed.

Design and launch your first new landing pages for active client accounts.



In 60 Days, You'll:

Partner closely with Growth Strategists to align page structure with ad hooks, offers, and buyer intent.

Start identifying patterns in what is driving or hurting conversion across pages.

Own the design and optimization of post-click experiences for multiple active accounts.

Contribute to a faster, more repeatable landing page production process



In 90 Days, You'll:

Be the clear internal owner of conversion-focused post-click design

Establish a more seamless system for building, iterating, and optimizing landing pages.

Consistently use AI tools to increase speed, output, and design leverage.

Provide strong guidance to the team on what users should land on after they click on an ad.



By Your One-Year Anniversary:

You will have helped establish Lucyd’s post-click experience as a meaningful performance lever across paid media. You will have contributed to:

Faster landing page creation and iteration

Higher-quality post-click experiences

Better alignment between ads, offers, and page structure

A more intentional system for designing and optimizing pages users land on after the click



Apply now to become an integral part of our mission to connect socially conscious brands with their audiences in meaningful ways.

description:

YouTube: 

LinkedIn: 

Instagram:

---



WHAT WE NEED

---



HOW TO APPLY

Applications without the video will not be reviewed.

title: Product lister
description:
???? Shopify Product Lister (Dropshipping – Women’s Fashion USA)



We are a fast-growing dropshipping store based in the USA, focused on women’s fashion.



We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Product Lister for a long-term position. We value people who do their work properly, consistently, and with attention to detail.



?



???? Your Task

 • Import products into Shopify using the Appocie extension

 • Clean and optimize product titles

 • Check the product description (do NOT fully rewrite it)

 • Keep the original structure

 • Remove any weird, spammy, or irrelevant text

 • Remove things like: “Only first 50 customers…”, other brand names, fake urgency, etc.

 • Check and correctly set all variants (sizes & colors)

 • Create a size chart using ChatGPT

 • Add the size chart using the Kiwi Size Chart app (Shopify app)

 • Ensure all sizes follow this format:

 • US Size | EU Size | Inches

 • Make the product page look clean, premium, and high-converting



?



?? Size Chart Requirement (VERY IMPORTANT)

 • The size chart must be added via the Kiwi Size Chart app

 • It must be linked to the product

 • It must appear on the product page when clicking “Size”

 • ? Do NOT paste the size chart in the description

 • ? Do NOT manually type it in the product description



?



????? Workflow (Important)

 • We provide product links in a shared sheet

 • You import the product using Appocie

 • After listing, you paste the final product link back into the sheet

 • You must be comfortable working with:

 • Poky (P-O-K-Y)

 • ChatGPT (for size charts)

 • Shopify apps & extensions



???? If you already have experience with Poky, you likely already have the required extensions set up.



?



???? Clothing Rules

 • Always use sizes: XS, S, M, L, XL, 2XL

 • Make sure the correct color is selected and assigned properly



?



???? Shoe Rules

 • Use only US sizes (no “US5 / EU39” format)

 • Correct format: 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, etc.

 • Base sizes on the competitor, but clean the format



?



???? Pricing Rules

 • We typically work with 60%–80% discounts

 • The compare price must ALWAYS be a rounded number

(Examples: 180, 190, 200 — NOT 186 or 208)



?



???? Workload

 • You will handle 10–15 products per day



?



?? Important Details

 • Product pages must look like a premium Shopify store, not a basic dropshipping page

 • Descriptions must be clean and trustworthy (no spam or fake urgency)

 • Variants must be 100?curate (no mistakes)



?



???? Test Task (REQUIRED)



If you think you are a good fit, complete the test below:

 1. Use your own Shopify store or a demo/test store (do NOT use our store)

 2. Import and optimize this product:

???? 

 3. Record a Loom video showing your full process:

 • Importing the product

 • Editing title & checking description

 • Setting variants

 • Creating the size chart with ChatGPT

 • Adding the size chart using the Kiwi Size Chart app

 • Showing that the size chart works on the product page (click “Size”)

 • Final product page

 4. In your video, you MUST say the word:

???? “Apple”

(This confirms you read everything)



?



???? Extra Requirements for the Test

 • You must add the size chart correctly to the product page

 • If the product has multiple colors, add this at the bottom of the description:

Buy two colors and get 15% off (in italic)

 • If there is only one color, do NOT add this line

 • Update the product URL/handle:

? Must be clean and based on the product name

? Example: 
/products/tarisa-sandal



?



???? Communication & Long-Term

 • We work via Slack

 • You will be added to our workspace for daily communication

 • We are looking for someone long-term and want to build a strong working relationship



If selected:

 • We will schedule a video call

 • You will receive access to our Shopify store

 • We aim to create a positive and professional working environment



?



???? Bonus & Growth

 • We reward good work

 • Strong performance = bonuses

 • As the business grows, you grow with us



?



???? Hiring Process

 • Complete the test task

 • We review your work carefully

 • If your work is good ? we schedule a video call

 • If the call goes well ? you are hired



?



???? How to Apply



After completing the test, send:

 • Your Loom video link (showing your full process)

 • The product page link of the product you created



?



Only applications with both the video and product link will be reviewed.



?



If you believe you are the right fit, complete the task above and we will speak soon.

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview: 



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office. 



 

Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents. 



 

About Power Plus Systems: 



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission. 



 

Objectives: 

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.



 

Competencies: 

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.



 

Equipment Requirements:  

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.



 

Physical Requirements: 

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.

 

Benefits: 

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply: 



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below. 




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply. 



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Graphic Designer (Music Education)
description:
** IMPORTANT: Only applications that follow directions will be read. Double check application before submitting**



Hello! 



I am looking for an independent contractor to assist with graphics and illustrations for music education, approximately 10 - 20 hours per week. Projects for this role include creating graphics for social media, illustrating original flat, minimal vector art, re-creating music notation for teaching materials, and creating thumbnails for teaching videos.



This role is perfect for artists who enjoy flexibility and autonomy in work schedules. It is also perfect for artists who enjoy children's illustrations, learning about music, working with a clean, minimal brand, and knowing you are making a difference for teachers who use your materials. Graphic design and illustration projects for this role include creating graphics for social media, illustrating original flat, minimal vector art, re-creating music notation for teaching materials, and creating thumbnails for YouTube videos.

title: ???? Video & Image Editor (Full-Time | Stable Income | High Volume Work)

• Long-term opportunity (not short-term projects)

• Simple, repeatable tasks

• Clear systems and workflows

• Opportunity to increase pay over time



We are not hiring freelancers — we are building a long-term team.



???? Your Main Task



Your job is to prepare and localize creatives for

This is a stable income role, not commission-based.



???? Growth Opportunity



If you perform well, you can grow into:



• Creative Lead

• Higher-paid roles inside the company



? Who This Is Perfect For



You are:

title: Fashion News Editor
description:
We are looking for an experienced and trend-savvy Fashion Editor to lead our women’s lifestyle coverage across fashion, celebrity style, beauty, and culture. This role sits at the intersection of editorial instinct and traffic performance, with a strong focus on daily newsletters, viral content, and audience growth.

You will be responsible for shaping a daily women’s newsletter, identifying what matters to women right now, and leading a small team of writers to produce engaging, high-performing fashion and lifestyle content.



Key Objectives



• Own and grow a daily women’s newsletter, driving strong open and click-through rates

• Identify daily fashion and women’s lifestyle trends worth covering

• Produce and commission traffic-generating fashion and entertainment stories

• Build a distinct editorial voice aligned with modern women’s interests

• Grow overall website traffic and newsletter engagement



Key Responsibilities

Editorial & Content Strategy

• Curate and edit a daily women’s newsletter, ensuring it is timely, relevant, and engaging

• D
 what fashion, beauty, and culture stories matter each day

• Develop content angles inspired by leading publications such as The Newsette, Stylist, ELLE, Vogue, and IBTimes UK Lifestyle

• Commission and write viral, SEO-optimised articles across:

• Celebrity fashion

• Red-carpet and street style

• Beauty and wellness trends

• Women-led culture and internet 
nts



Leadership & Team Management

• Lead and mentor a team of writers

• Assign stories, refine angles, and copy-edit articles to publication standard

• Ensure writers understand traffic-driven storytelling, headline optimisation, and audience behaviour



Newsletter & Social Growth

• Grow newsletter engagement by improving:

• Open rates

• Click-through rates

• Promote key stories via social media and newsletters

• Collaborate with social and growth teams to amplify reach



Performance & KPIs

• Monitor article performance and newsletter metrics

• Optimise content based on reader behaviour and analytics

• Use data to inform editorial decisions and improve output



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

• Newsletter open rate and click-through rate

• Website traffic growth from fashion and women’s lifestyle content

• Engagement metrics (time on page, clicks, shares)

• Consistent production of high-performing, viral stories



What We’re Looking For

• Proven experience as a Fashion Editor, Lifestyle Editor, or Senior Fashion Writer

• Strong understanding of women’s fashion, beauty, and cultural trends

• Experience managing writers and editing content

• Ability to write viral, SEO-friendly headlines and stories

• Confident using data and analytics to guide editorial decisions

• Passionate about women’s interests and storytelling

• Comfortable balancing creativity with performance goals



Bonus Points

• Experience running or contributing to a daily newsletter

• Strong social media instincts

• Background in entertainment or celebrity coverage

• Familiarity with Google Discover and traffic-driven content



Why Join Us

• Opportunity to shape and own a growing women’s editorial vertical

• Creative freedom backed by data-driven strategy

• Lead a team and influence content direction at scale

• Work remotely with a fast-moving, ambitious editorial team

title: Cold Calling + Email Sales Rep (Hourly + Commission)
description:
We’re a fast-growing outbound team working with small agency clients, helping them turn positive cold
 replies into booked calls and real sales opportunities.



This is not a generic admin role.



We are looking for someone who is confident in sales, excellent in English, highly organised, and fast when it comes to handling lead conversations.



In this role, you’ll be managing conversations with warm prospects who have replied to cold
 campaigns. Your job is to reply quickly, handle the conversation well, and move the prospect toward booking a call with the salesperson inside the client’s business.



Some campaigns will also require calling warm prospects who have already replied positively, so this role is ideal for someone who is strong both in written sales and on the phone.



You’ll typically be working across 5 to 15 client campaigns at a time, so being sharp, organised, and dependable matters.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Managing inboxes for multiple cold
 campaigns



Replying quickly to positive and interested leads



Turning warm conversations into booked calls



Following scripts, processes, and booking flows



Calling warm prospects for selected client campaigns



Keeping lead conversations organised across multiple accounts



Supporting campaign performance by handling replies well and consistently



Working closely with our team across different client accounts



What Makes This Role Different:



You are speaking with warm prospects, not completely cold leads



The main goal is to create booked calls, not just send messages



You’ll be involved in both written sales and phone-based follow-up



You’ll be working across multiple live campaigns, not just one account



There is room to grow if you perform well



Pay Structure:



$3.75 USD per hour from our agency



Additional earning opportunities through one of our partner client campaigns



Small commission / bonus per booked call on specific calling campaigns



Strong performers can materially increase their earnings through incentives



This is a blended role. You’ll be part of our team, but for some calling work you may also support a specific partner client campaign that we are involved in. We will train you, manage you, and support you directly.



Who We’re Looking For:

Required:



Strong written and spoken English



Confident sales communication skills



Fast reply speed and strong attention to detail



Comfortable speaking with prospects on the phone



Ability to manage multiple conversations and campaigns at once



Reliable internet and a professional remote work setup



Hungry, dependable, and performance-driven



Strong Plus:



Cold calling experience



Appointment setting experience



Inbox management experience



Experience working with cold
 campaigns



Experience using CRMs, dialers, or sales tools



Who This Role Suits:

This role is ideal for someone who enjoys sales, likes moving conversations forward, and wants more than a basic remote job.



If you are sharp, organised, persuasive, and motivated by performance, this could be a strong fit.



How to Apply:

To apply, complete this Google Form:





As part of your application, you must create a personalised Loom video and submit the Loom link inside the Google Form.



In your Loom video, tell us:



What sales experience you have



Why you are interested in a remote role focused on cold
 and sales



Why you think you would be a good fit for this role



Please keep your video to 2 minutes or less.



Applications without a Loom video will not be considered.

title: Video Editor (Part-Time, Remote)
description:
Company: Agency Growth Partner (AGP)

Rate: $600-$900/month

Type: Part-time

Location: Remote - strong written English required



---



ABOUT AGP



Agency Growth Partner helps marketing agencies grow. Ethan Welby (founder) has personally helped scale 500+ marketing agencies, coaches inside Iman Gadzhi's Agency Accelerator program and Charlie Morgan's program, and AGP clients have generated a combined $4,100,000+.



We build client acquisition and operational systems so agency owners can scale without being stuck in the day-to-day.



YouTube: 

LinkedIn: 
 

Instagram: 
 



---



THE ROLE



We are building a business YouTube channel and need a video editor who understands retention and knows how to make people keep watching.



You will edit talking-head footage into finished YouTube videos and short-form clips. You will also edit Meta ad creatives. You work directly with the founder.



The style we are going for: fast-paced, value-dense, business content. Reference channels: Alex Hormozi, Dan Martell, Caleb Ralston.



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO



- Edit 1 long-form YouTube video per week (10-20 minutes). Talking head with b-roll, captions, text overlays, and basic motion graphics.

- Create 1 short-form clip per day from existing long-form content (Shorts, Reels, TikTok).

- Edit 5 Meta ad creatives per week (20-40 seconds). Direct-response style, strong opening, clear message.

- Keep files organized. Raw footage, project files, and exports all in the right place.

- Track basic performance numbers each week and flag what is working.



---



WHAT WE NEED



- At least 1 year editing business or entrepreneurship YouTube content.

- Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro. After Effects is a plus.

- Good with captions, pacing, and audio cleanup.

- Can deliver a first draft within 48-72 hours of receiving footage.

- Communicates clearly. Flags issues early. Does not go quiet.

- Meets deadlines without being chased.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Send your application with:



1. A link to your portfolio. Business or talking-head content specifically.

2. One example of a specific editing decision you made to improve retention in a video.

3. Your expected monthly rate and your availability.

title: Operations and AI Automation Manager (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
Company: Agency Growth Partner (AGP)

Rate: $1,200-$1,500/month depending on experience

Hours: Full-time, 40 hrs/week

Location: Remote - strong written English required



---



ABOUT AGP



Agency Growth Partner helps marketing agencies grow. Ethan Welby (founder) has personally helped scale 500+ marketing agencies, coaches inside Iman Gadzhi's Agency Accelerator program and Charlie Morgan's program, and AGP clients have generated a combined $4,100,000+.



We build client acquisition and operational systems so agency owners can book more calls, close more deals, and deliver results without being involved in everything.



YouTube: 

LinkedIn: 

Instagram: 



---



THE ROLE



We are looking for someone to own the day-to-day operations of our agency and push as much of the business as possible toward automation.



We run a fast-moving operation. We are coaching hundreds of agencies, running DFY client delivery, managing outreach systems, and building content at the same time. There are a lot of moving parts and not a lot of time to babysit processes. We need someone who can look at a messy system, understand what is broken, and fix it without being asked twice.



Your main job is to save time through automation. You will look at every manual process in the business and find ways to replace it with something automated or AI-powered.



If you need to be micromanaged, this is not the right fit.



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Daily Operations:

- Keep things running. Coordinate with external partners, manage content distribution, maintain current systems.

- Manage and update Notion SOPs and playbooks.

- Coordinate with the team daily via Slack.

- Spot problems before they get worse.



Automation and AI (Main Focus):

- Build and maintain automations using n8n, Zapier, and AI tools like Claude, ChatGPT, and Manus.

- Fix broken automations on your own without escalating every issue.

- Design and ship at least one new AI-powered workflow per month.

- Continuously look for manual tasks in the business and automate them.



---



WHAT WE NEED



- Proven experience with n8n and/or Zapier. Real multi-step automations, not just basic triggers.

- You can describe a specific automation you built: what tools it connected, what problem it solved, what the result was.

- You use AI tools like Claude or ChatGPT daily, not just occasionally.

- You have worked in an agency or marketing agency before.

- You are proficient in Notion. You can build and maintain SOPs, not just read them.

- Strong written English. Clear, direct, no fluff.

- Highly organized and self-directed. You manage your own workload without reminders.



Nice to Have:

- Close CRM experience.

- Experience designing AI workflows or agents.

- Experience with LinkedIn automation tools.

- Deep n8n expertise.



---



WHY JOIN US



This is not a role where you execute tasks and wait for the next one. You own the operations of a real, growing business.



If you build a workflow that saves 10 hours a week, that is yours. You will see the direct impact of your work. The business gets faster because of you, and you will know it.



Working directly with the founder means no layers of management, no waiting for approvals, no politics. You will have Ethan on Slack. Feedback comes fast. If you have a good idea, it gets heard the same day. You will have full context on what the business is doing and why, not just a task list handed down from someone you never talk to.



We also invest in the people on our team. If there is a tool, course, or resource that helps you do your job better, we cover it.



This role can grow significantly as we scale. If you are the right person, there is a lot more responsibility and opportunity available.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Send your application with:



1. A specific example of an automation you built. What tools did it connect, what problem did it solve, what was the result?

2. Your experience working in an agency environment.

3. Your expected monthly rate.

4. Your availability to start.



Applications without a specific automation example will not be reviewed.

title: Bookkeeper
description:
Bookkeeper



Working Hours: 9:00 AM to 7:00 PM HKT (Monday to Friday) including 1-hour lunch break and 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM HKT (Saturday)



JOB SUMMARY



We are seeking a highly skilled and organized Bookkeeper with strong hands-on experience with Xero to manage our financial records and ensure accurate bookkeeping practices. The Bookkeeper will work as a Contractor and play a key role in maintaining financial transactions, reconciling accounts, preparing financial statements, and assisting in financial reporting. This position requires strong attention to detail, proficiency in Xero, and the ability to work independently.



With a high level of attention to detail and a focus on delivering accurate work on time, you should be able to transform a conversation into high-quality documents and instructions.



RESPONSIBILITIES



• Financial Data Management:

o Record day-to-day financial transactions, including accounts receivable, accounts payable, and general ledger entries.

o Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records, ensuring proper classification and coding of transactions.

o Track and manage petty cash to ensure accurate recording of small expenditures.

o Categorize and allocate expenses to the appropriate accounts.

o Perform bank reconciliations and ensure the accuracy of financial data entries.

o Track financial transactions by building up accounts, completing the posting process, and ensuring compliance with legal requirements.



• Financial Reporting and Analysis:

o Prepare and analyze monthly Profit and Loss (P&L) statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements.

o Assist in the preparation of monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports.

o Provide insights into financial performance to support decision-making processes.



• Payroll and Benefits Administration:

o Process payroll, ensuring accurate calculations of salaries, deductions, and benefits.

o Maintain employee payroll records.

o Coordinate with HR to ensure compliance with payroll regulations and timely submission of required reports.



• Compliance:

o Assist in the preparation of financial data for audits, ensuring compliance with relevant accounting standards and regulations.

o Collaborate with external auditors, providing necessary documentation and support during the auditing process.

o Ensure alignment with tax laws, reporting requirements, and tax filing deadlines.

o Stay updated on changes in accounting standards and regulations to ensure ongoing compliance.



• Inventory and Purchase Order Management:

o Monitor incoming, outgoing, and shipped products.

o Coordinate with the supply chain department to track inventory levels, purchase orders, and reconcile received goods.

o Collaborate with the supply chain team to resolve any discrepancies or issues related to inventory or purchase orders.



• Financial Systems and Process Improvement:

o Set up bookkeeping policies and procedures.

o Help lessen control risk in the inventory process by suggesting policies.

o Identify opportunities for process improvement in financial systems and procedures, recommending and implementing changes to enhance efficiency and accuracy.



QUALIFICATIONS & SKILLS



• Minimum three (3) years of relevant experience in Bookkeeping or Accounting roles.

• Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.

• Strong hands-on experience with Xero software is a must.

• Strong knowledge of accounting principles, financial reporting, and bookkeeping practices.

• Experience in integrations (e.g., DEXT) is a plus.

• Experience with inventory management systems such as Cin7 or similar systems is a big plus.

• Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, with a high attention to detail.

• Strong organizational and time management skills.

• Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

• Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

• Ability to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines.



Essential Requirements for Remote Work:

• Reliable Laptop or Desktop Computer.

• Stable and high-speed internet connection.

• Power source and backup internet connection in case of electricity interruptions.



***How to Apply***



Take the next step by completing our application form:


/
/f/3j1fc-35945/HQ578HNFWTW3B7LXDL



Note: Only successful candidates will be contacted for the next phase of the selection process. We appreciate your time and interest in joining our team.

title: Sales Development Representative - B2B SaaS
description:
Company Overview



At LevelUp, we believe growth happens when people feel trusted, supported, and challenged. For more than seven years we’ve partnered with agencies, software vendors and website owners to provide world class outsourcing and offshore hiring services in a range of verticals, such as technical, operational, and back-office support. We hire curious problem-solvers, give them room to own outcomes, and back them with systems, support and a culture that makes learning part of the job. Join us and help businesses (and your career) level up.



Position Overview



We are looking for a proactive, resourceful Sales Development Representative to support our client’s global B2B SaaS sales team. You will handle inbound and outbound outreach for the auditing & accounting SaaS product across different countries, qualify prospects, and book meetings for sales executives. Strong English communication skills are essential in order to match the high level of detail and precision expected by auditing and accounting professionals. You do not need deep technical product knowledge, but you must be able to understand the key differences between product versions across different regions and communicate them clearly to prospects.



Key Responsibilities

•Reach out to inbound leads from English-speaking markets via phone,
, and LinkedIn.

•Qualify leads against the Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) and basic business needs.

•Understand and apply regional differences in the software when speaking with prospects.

•Use discovery questions to confirm pain points, fit, and level of interest.

•Book qualified meetings for sales executives and manage calendar invites.

•Execute directed outbound campaigns 
, call, sequences) to target accounts and contact lists.

•Maintain accurate and up-to-date records in the CRM (e.g. lead status, notes, follow-up tasks).

•Follow approved scripts,
 templates, and objection-handling guidelines.

•Meet or exceed monthly targets for:

•Qualified meetings booked (e.g. 20 per month)

•Activity volumes (calls,
s, InMails)

-writing skills

s, InMails)

-writing skills

title: Designer (PDF Guides + Social Media) — Listadum
description:
Designer (PDF Guides + Social Media) — Listadum



We’re looking for a designer who can make things feel clear, modern, and worth saving.



Not just “nice visuals”…

But designs that Etsy sellers actually stop for, read, and keep.



About Listadum



Listadum helps Etsy sellers improve their listings and grow their shop.



Our audience = creative people (artists, makers)

But they struggle with the business side.



So design matters a lot.

It needs to feel:



simple

clean

a bit “aesthetic”

but still practical

What you’ll do

Design PDF guides (lead magnets, checklists, mini ebooks)

Create Instagram carousels

Design Pinterest pins

Create simple ad creatives

Turn raw ideas into polished, easy-to-read visuals



Examples:



“Etsy Listing Checklist”

“Why your listing isn’t selling”

“Top mistakes Etsy sellers make”

You might be a great fit if:

You have strong layout skills (this is key)

You know how to structure information visually

You can make content feel easy to understand

You have good taste (fonts, spacing, colors)

You don’t overdesign everything

What we care about

Clarity over decoration

Clean hierarchy (what do I read first?)

Scroll-stopping but not loud

Designs people want to save

Bonus

Experience with Canva or Figma

Understanding of social media formats (carousels, pins)

Experience with info-products / guides

Familiarity with Etsy or creative audiences

How to apply



Send us:



3–5 examples of your work

(PDF, carousel, or similar preferred)



(Optional but strong):

Show us how you’d design this:



“5 reasons your Etsy listing isn’t getting sales”

title: Ecommerce Business Growth Executive
description:
Own Category Growth, Optimize Performance, and Expand Market Dominance.



Hadley Designs is seeking a Business Executive to take full ownership of a multi-million dollar product category, with Amazon as the primary growth channel. This is a high-impact role for a results-driven e-commerce operator who thrives on ownership, accountability, and driving measurable growth through disciplined execution and data-backed decision-making.



While this role operates deeply within Amazon, we welcome candidates who have driven growth across e-commerce, DTC, or marketplace environments and are excited to apply that experience within a scaled Amazon ecosystem.



How You’ll Win at Hadley Designs:

We believe performance comes from strong systems executed consistently.



Every eCommerce Business Executive is expected to progress through three stages:



- Learn the Playbook – Understand our category strategy, operating standards, and decision frameworks

- Apply the Playbook – Execute accurately and consistently to deliver predictable, scalable results

- Enhance the Playbook – Improve systems with new ideas and strategies after mastery is demonstrated



This order matters. We value innovation, but only when it is grounded in proven execution. Our playbook exists to help high performers win faster, create leverage, and scale impact — not slow them down.

title: AI Avatar Creator (Hyper-Realistic Digital Twin for Influencer Content)
description:
AI Avatar Creator (Hyper-Realistic Digital Twin for Influencer Content)



?



Job Description:

I am looking for a highly skilled AI creator who can build a hyper-realistic AI avatar twin of myself for social media content.



The goal is not a generic AI model, but a high-accuracy digital twin that closely matches my face, expressions, energy, and overall presence. This avatar will be used to create content that can realistically replace me on camera.



?



Key Requirements:



1. Digital Twin Creation

 • Build a highly realistic AI avatar based on my real face

 • Must capture:

 • Facial structure

 • Natural expressions (not overly staged)

 • My specific look and energy

 • Avoid “AI-perfect” or overly smooth results ? realism is critical



?



2. Lip Sync & Video Output

 • Advanced lip-sync capability (non-negotiable)

 • Avatar must speak naturally and match spoken content precisely

 • Output should look like real recorded video (not animated or artificial)



?



3. Voice Cloning

 • Ability to clone my real voice

 • I will provide voice samples

 • Final output must sound:

 • Natural

 • Emotionally aligned

 • Not robotic



?



4. Language Requirement

 • Scripts will be provided in German

 • Avatar must speak fluent, natural-sounding German



?



5. Test Project (Mandatory)

 • Before hiring, I require a test sample

 • I will provide:

 • Photos/videos of myself

 • A short script

 • You will create a short demo video to evaluate:

 • Visual similarity

 • Lip sync quality

 • Voice realism



?



Style Direction:

 • Premium, clean, feminine, high-end aesthetic

 • Natural, authentic look (not over-edited or “AI-glossy”)

 • Confident but soft presence (coach / thought leader energy)



?



Ideal Candidate:

 • Proven experience with AI avatars / digital humans

 • Strong portfolio (please include samples)

 • Experience with:

 • Lip sync tools

 • Voice cloning (e.g. ElevenLabs or similar)

 • Realistic video generation

 • Detail-oriented and able to iterate based on feedback



?



Goal:



To create a scalable AI version of myself that can consistently produce high-quality content for my brand.



?



If you understand high-end personal branding and can deliver near-indistinguishable results from a real person, apply with relevant examples and your approach.

title: b2b conversation starter/ Vistasge member recruiter
description:
Role Overview



We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Lead Development & Executive Outreach Specialist to support the growth of Vistage CEO and Key Executive peer advisory groups.
