title: Finance Controller with Streamline Portal Expertise
description:
Job Title: Finance Controller with Streamline Portal Expertise

Company: Band of Brothers Investment Group

 Location: Remote

 Employment Type: Full-Time

 Reports To: Chief Executive Officer (CEO) / Managing Partners

Salary: $1,400 - $1,700 / monthly (Depending on the experience)





We Need: A Strategic Financial Leader with Precision, Integrity, and a Deep Understanding of Investment Operations and Streamline Portal

Band of Brothers Investment Group is seeking a seasoned Controller to provide assistance with our financial systems and reporting. As our company scales and diversifies its portfolio, we require a proactive finance leader who can ensure the highest standards of accuracy, compliance, and strategic insight.

The ideal candidate will have deep expertise in financial oversight, investment fund accounting, regulatory reporting, cash flow management and understanding on the streamline portal. You must be comfortable managing a lean team, implementing financial controls, and advising executives on fiscal strategies.



Key Responsibilities

Financial Oversight

Manage all accounting operations including general ledger, A/P, A/R, payroll, budgeting, and tax planning

Maintain and improve financial controls, procedures, and reporting structures

Ensure compliance with GAAP and regulatory requirements



Reporting & Analysis

Prepare accurate monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements

Provide financial reporting for internal stakeholders and investment partners

Monitor and forecast cash flow, financial risk, and capital requirements



Strategic Finance Support

Work closely with executive leadership to align financial goals with investment strategy

Analyze ROI and profitability across various investment projects and divisions

Lead budgeting, forecasting, and long-term financial planning



Audit & Compliance

Coordinate and oversee annual audits and liaise with external auditors

Ensure compliance with relevant SEC, IRS, or state-level investment fund regulations

Manage relationships with financial institutions, legal advisors, and external accountants





Team Management (if applicable)

Supervise and mentor junior accounting staff or financial analysts

Create a culture of accuracy, accountability, and proactive financial management





Requirements

Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field (CPA or MBA strongly preferred)

Minimum 5+ years of progressive financial experience, preferably within private equity, investment, or real estate sectors

Deep understanding of investment accounting, cash flow modeling, and fund structures

Strong knowledge of GAAP, compliance, and risk mitigation practices

Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced, growth-oriented environment

Strong background and experience with Multifamily Real Estate accounting software

Experience with Appfolio platform for Rental Properties

Experience with Streamline Portal for Rental Properties

Advanced Excel skills and familiarity with accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, NetSuite, or industry-specific systems)

Excellent organizational, analytical, and communication skills





Preferred Qualifications

Experience with fund administration, investor reporting, or capital call processes

Familiarity with investment strategy modeling, financial benchmarking, or real estate financials

Prior experience scaling financial operations in a startup or expanding firm





What We Offer

Flexible work environment

Opportunity to grow with a mission-driven, values-based investment group

A collaborative leadership team and a meaningful investment vision

title: Employee Benefits Agency Appointment Setter
description:
Virtual Appointment Setter (Full-Time | Work From Home | Philippines)



About the Role



We are a growing U.S.-based company looking for a **driven and results-oriented Appointment Setter** to join our team.



Your primary responsibility is simple:



**Generate and schedule qualified appointments with businesses and potential recruits through cold outreach**



This includes:



* Cold calling

*
 outreach

* LinkedIn messaging



This is a **performance-based role**. If you are confident, persistent, and motivated by hitting targets—this is a great opportunity.



What You’ll Be Doing



* Daily outbound outreach:



  * Cold calls

  *
s

  * LinkedIn messages

* Engaging and qualifying prospects

* Booking appointments on our calendar

* Scheduling initial interviews with candidates/leads

* Following up with prospects consistently

* Updating CRM and tracking activity



 Weekly Targets (Non-Negotiable)



* ? **7 Qualified Sales Appointments Booked per Week**

* ? **7 First Interviews Scheduled per Week**



You will be measured on RESULTS, not just activity.



Requirements



* Strong English communication (clear speaking is critical)

* Comfortable making cold calls daily

* Sales or appointment setting experience preferred

* Not afraid of rejection

* Highly organized and consistent

* Self-motivated (no micromanaging)

* Reliable internet + quiet workspace



Pay & Perks



* Base salary (depending on experience)

* Results Based Bonuses

* Long-term opportunity with growth potential



Schedule



* Must work **U.S. business hours (EST)**

* Full-time preferred



Who This Is For



* You like targets and hitting goals

* You are competitive and driven

 Who This Is NOT For



* You are uncomfortable on the phone

Final Note



We are looking for someone who wants to grow, earn, and be part of a winning team.



If you can hit targets and stay consistent, this role can turn into a long-term, high-income opportunity.

title: AI SEO & Content Marketing Specialist — WordPress, GMB, Backlinks, Social Media
description:
AI SEO & Content Marketing Specialist



Company: VSF Marketing — Full-Service Digital Marketing Agency (Tampa, FL, USA)

Employment: Full-Time (40 hours/week) | Remote | Philippines-Based



ABOUT VSF MARKETING

VSF Marketing is a veteran-owned, family-operated full-service digital marketing agency based in Tampa Bay, Florida. With 20+ years of experience, we deliver WordPress websites, SEO, Google Ads, social media,
 marketing, and complete marketing solutions for U.S. business owners — especially home services contractors (HVAC, plumbing, roofing, electrical, landscaping), professional services, medical/dental, real estate, and construction.



We are building an AI-powered marketing team. You MUST know how to use AI tools and prompts to deliver real marketing results — not just talk about AI, but actually use it daily to produce high-quality work at scale.



THE ROLE:

You will be our AI-powered SEO and content marketing engine — responsible for driving organic traffic, local rankings, and content strategy for multiple U.S. business clients using AI tools, proven SEO processes, and hands-on execution.



WHAT YOU'LL DO DAILY:

- AI-Powered SEO Execution — Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Jasper, SurferSEO, Frase, SEMrush AI, etc.) to research keywords, optimize pages, build content strategies, and execute on-page/off-page SEO

- On-Page SEO — Optimize meta titles, descriptions, headers, internal linking, schema markup, image alt tags, page speed recommendations for WordPress websites

- Content Creation — Write blog posts, service pages, location pages, FAQ pages, and guest posts using AI prompts AND human editing to ensure quality

- Google My Business Management — Optimize GMB profiles, post updates, manage photos, respond to reviews, build local citations for map pack rankings

- Backlink Building — Execute ethical link-building campaigns: guest posts, industry directories, Reddit, niche community links — NO black hat tactics, NO Google penalties

- Local SEO — Manage local citations, NAP consistency, location pages that resonate with each city's audience, local keyword targeting

- AI SEO Strategy — Stay current on AI search (SGE, AI Overviews) and optimize content to appear in AI-generated search results

- Content Graphics — Use AI tools (Canva AI, Midjourney, Adobe Express, DALL-E) to create supporting graphics for blog posts, social media, and website content

- Social Media Content — Create and schedule AI-assisted social media posts for client
, Instagram, LinkedIn accounts

- SEMrush Management — Run site audits, track rankings, monitor competitors, generate reports using SEMrush

- WordPress Management — Edit pages, update content, manage themes/plugins, ensure sites are fast and mobile-optimized

- Reporting — Deliver weekly/monthly SEO performance reports with rankings, traffic, backlinks, and content metrics



MUST-HAVE REQUIREMENTS:

1. Proven AI Tool Proficiency — You actively use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Jasper, SurferSEO, Frase, or similar) in your daily SEO/content work. Show us your workflow.

2. SEO Experience (2+ years) — Demonstrable results: rankings improved, traffic increased, local pack positions gained

3. Content Writing — Can produce high-quality, human-readable content using AI assistance. No robotic AI-dump content.

4. Google My Business — Hands-on experience optimizing GMB profiles and ranking in local map packs

5. WordPress Proficiency — Comfortable editing WordPress sites, installing plugins, optimizing pages

6. SEMrush or Ahrefs — Experience running site audits, keyword research, competitor analysis, rank tracking

7. Backlink Building — Ethical link-building experience with measurable results

8. Perfect English — Clear, professional written English. Content must read naturally to U.S. audiences.

9. Self-Motivated & Accountable — You manage your time, hit deadlines, and report results without being chased

10. 40-Hour/Week Commitment — Full-time schedule aligned with U.S. Eastern Time business hours



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS (Big Plus):

- Experience with AI prompt engineering for marketing

- Google Analytics 4 and Google Search Console proficiency

- Experience serving U.S. home services businesses

- Social media management experience

- Graphic design skills (Canva, Adobe, AI image tools)

- Knowledge of Sandler Sales methodology or marketing funnels

- Experience with CRM tools (Accelo, HubSpot, etc.)



THE VSF WAY — How We Work:

- Everything is managed in our CRM (Accelo) — tasks, deadlines, deliverables

- Google Workspace for communication and collaboration

- Every deliverable is documented and trackable

- You communicate proactively — no surprises, no excuses

- You follow our onboarding process for each client

- Quality over quantity — but we expect both

- If a client pays for a service, that service gets delivered. Period.



TOOLS YOU'LL USE:

- AI Tools (ChatGPT, Claude, SurferSEO, Frase, Canva AI, etc.)

- SEMrush (site audits, rankings, competitor analysis)

- WordPress (website management)

- Google Analytics 4 + Google Search Console

- Google My Business

- Accelo CRM (task/project management)

- Google Workspace (Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Calendar)

- Slack (team communication)

- VBOUT 
 marketing)



WEEKLY PERFORMANCE EXPECTATIONS:

- Blog posts published per client: 2-4 per week

- GMB posts/updates: 3-5 per client per week

- Backlinks acquired: 5-10 quality links per week

- SEO audits/optimizations: ongoing per client schedule

- Reporting: weekly status updates, monthly performance reports

- All tasks logged in Accelo with status updates



WHAT WE OFFER:

- Competitive salary with performance bonuses

- Full-time, stable employment — not freelance/project-based

- Full AI tool stack provided

- Training on our processes and the VSF way

- Growth path to senior marketing roles or team lead

- Work with real U.S. clients across multiple industries

- 100% remote — quiet workspace and reliable internet required



HOW TO APPLY:

In your application, please include:

1. Your experience with AI tools for SEO/content (which tools, how you use them, specific prompts or workflows)

2. SEO results you've achieved (rankings, traffic growth, specific examples)

3. A writing sample or portfolio link showing your content work

4. Your experience with WordPress, GMB, and SEMrush

5. Why you're the right person for this AI-powered marketing role



WARNING: Applications without specific AI tool experience and SEO results will not be considered. We need proof, not promises.



VSF Marketing is a veteran-owned, family-operated business. We value integrity, hard work, and results. If you can use AI to deliver real marketing results — not just generate fluff — we want you on our team.

title: Accounting Assistant (Construction Accounting – Sage 100)
description:
Accounting Assistant (Construction Accounting – Sage 100)



Location: Remote (Philippines Preferred)

Employment Type: Full-Time

Target Hours: 40–45 hours per week

Compensation: 55,000 – 64,000 PHP per month

Payment Frequency: Bi-weekly



Position Overview:

We are seeking a detail-oriented Accounting Assistant with experience in Sage 100 and construction accounting to support our accounting and operations teams.



This role focuses primarily on Accounts Payable, Accounts Receivable, and operational financial support within a small business construction environment. The position also assists operations teams with purchase orders, budgets, and job tracking activities.



While a Fractional CFO team manages higher-level accounting functions such as WIP adjustments, financial statements, reconciliations, and month-end close, this internal role supports the day-to-day accounting and operational processes that keep projects running smoothly.



The ideal candidate is highly organized, comfortable working with numbers, and confident communicating with both accounting staff and field operations teams.



Key Responsibilities

1. Accounts Payable & Vendor Management

- Process vendor invoices and accounts payable transactions in Sage 100

- Maintain accurate vendor payment records

- Assist with payment processing and documentation

- Follow up with vendors or internal teams when clarification is required



2. Accounts Receivable & Client Billing

- Generate and track client invoices

- Maintain accurate AR records

- Assist with payment tracking and reconciliation

- Support documentation related to project billing



3. Purchase Orders, Budgets & Job Cost Tracking

- Load and manage Purchase Orders (POs) in Sage 100

- Assist with budget entry and job cost tracking

- Support tracking of project expenses against budgets

- Maintain organized financial and project documentation



4. Operational Accounting Support

- Assist Operations Managers with financial tracking and reporting

- Analyze GPS reports and operational data used for approving field timecards

- Maintain financial spreadsheets and job tracking records

- Provide operational accounting support to field teams when needed



5. Coordination with Finance Leadership

- Support the Fractional CFO team by maintaining accurate underlying records

- Assist with documentation used for WIP reviews and monthly close

- Ensure accounting records remain organized and audit-ready



Required Qualifications

Education

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related business field preferred

- Business degree with accounting coursework also acceptable



Technical Skills

- Hands-on experience with Sage 100 accounting software (required)

- Strong proficiency with Microsoft Excel (MS365)

- Experience using Google Sheets / Google Docs

- Comfortable managing financial spreadsheets and operational tracking data



Professional Skills

- Strong attention to detail and accuracy

- Comfortable working with financial data and numbers

- Highly organized with strong task management skills

- Confident communicator who can follow up with vendors, operations teams, and field staff

- Able to work effectively in a small business environment where roles may overlap



Preferred Qualifications

- Construction accounting experience

- Familiarity with job costing and Percentage of Completion (POC) accounting

- Experience supporting small business accounting teams

- Experience supporting operations or field-based teams

- Familiarity with financial reporting tools or dashboards (Power BI a plus)



Ideal Candidate Profile

The ideal candidate:

- Has hands-on experience with Sage 100

- Understands construction accounting or job cost tracking

- Is comfortable working in a small business environment

- Is proactive in following up on missing information or financial documentation

- Communicates confidently with operations teams and field staff

- Enjoys supporting both accounting and operational processes



What Success Looks Like

- Accurate processing of AP and AR transactions

- Organized purchase orders, budgets, and financial records

- Timely and accurate client invoicing

- Effective collaboration with operations managers and field teams

- Clean and well-maintained accounting records supporting monthly financial close

- Reliable operational reporting that supports project management



To apply:

1. Send your most updated resume. 

2. Send a link to a 1-2 minute audio introduction

title: AI Web Developer
description:
AI Agent Developer (Agentic AI Systems)



We’re looking for an AI Agent Developer to help us design and build intelligent systems powered by Large Language Models and autonomous AI agents.



In this role, you’ll develop AI-native web applications and agent-driven systems that can reason, plan, interact with APIs, and automate complex workflows.



Our focus is not just chatbots. We build production-grade AI systems capable of executing multi-step tasks, coordinating tools, and delivering real-world outcomes.



If you enjoy building cutting-edge AI products and turning ideas into intelligent systems, we’d love to hear from you.





What You'll Work On

You’ll help us build next-generation AI applications, including:

• Autonomous AI agents that can plan and execute multi-step workflows

• AI-powered web applications and platforms

• LLM-driven systems that interact with APIs, databases, and external tools

• Intelligent automation systems that solve real business problems



These systems combine reasoning (LLMs), memory (knowledge bases), and actions (tools/APIs) to create truly autonomous software.





Responsibilities

• Design and build AI-powered applications and agent-driven systems

• Develop autonomous agents capable of reasoning, planning, and executing tasks

• Integrate LLMs such as Claude, GPT, or open-source models

• Design multi-step workflows where AI interacts with APIs, databases, and external tools

• Build AI orchestration pipelines for managing agent behavior and workflows

Develop production-ready AI services and APIs

• Collaborate with the team to bring AI-powered features into real-world products

• Document system architecture, design decisions, and implementation strategies



Requirements

• Strong experience in backend or full-stack web development

• Hands-on experience building AI-powered applications or LLM integrations

• Experience designing or implementing AI agents, automation systems, or intelligent workflows

• Understanding of how agent-based AI systems reason, plan, and take actions

• Ability to explain the architecture and logic behind systems you’ve built

• Passion for exploring and implementing emerging AI technologies



Technical Skills

Experience with some of the following:

Languages

• Python

• Node.js / TypeScript



AI & LLM Technologies

• OpenAI, Claude, or similar models

• Prompt engineering and structured outputs

• LLM orchestration frameworks (LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, etc.)



AI Infrastructure

• Vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, pgvector, etc.)

• Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)

• Knowledge bases and embeddings



Systems & Integration

• API integrations

• Workflow automation

• Tool-based AI architectures



Cloud & Deployment

• AWS, GCP, or similar

• Containerized deployments

• Building scalable production services



Nice to Have

Experience with:

• Multi-agent systems

• AI workflow orchestration

• Observability and evaluation for AI systems

• AI safety, prompt injection mitigation, or guardrails

• Open-source LLM deployments



What We Offer

? 100% Remote (Full-Time) — Work from anywhere

? Work with a passionate and driven team

? Build cutting-edge AI systems and products

? Opportunity to shape the future of AI-powered software



Apply

Send your resume or portfolio here. (Make sure to add the file or link)



We’re excited to meet developers who want to build the future of AI-native applications and autonomous systems.

title: Senior Klaviyo Email Marketing Specialist — Retention & Strategy (US Fashion Brand)
description:
We’re looking for a Senior Klaviyo
 Marketing Specialist to manage and optimize our
 marketing efforts for a major fashion brand.

This is a strategic and performance-focused role — ideal for someone who understands retention, lifecycle strategy, deliverability, and KPI optimization inside Klaviyo.

You will own the performance and execution of daily campaigns and automations, ensuring that every send is strategically timed, properly segmented, and driving measurable results.

Our internal creative team will provide the copy and graphics — your focus is strategy, setup, scheduling, segmentation, deliverability, and performance tracking.



Key Responsibilities

Manage and send daily Klaviyo campaigns (you’ll arrange, schedule, QA, segment, and deploy — the team provides creative assets).

Build, optimize, and scale Klaviyo flows (welcome, cart, post-purchase, win-back, VIP, etc.) to improve retention and LTV.

Develop advanced segmentation and personalization strategies based on customer behavior and purchase history.

Monitor and improve
 deliverability and list health — maintain high sender reputation and compliance.

Analyze and report on key metrics (deliverability, open rate, CTR, CVR, revenue per recipient, unsubscribe rate, retention rate, etc.).

Run A/B tests on subject lines, content, and send timing to continuously improve results.

Collaborate closely with creative, brand, and marketing teams to align messaging with campaign goals.

Stay up to date with Klaviyo features and industry best practices in retention marketing.



Requirements

3+ years of professional
 marketing experience, including 2+ years hands-on in Klaviyo.

Proven success running daily campaign schedules and automated flows that drive measurable retention and revenue growth.

Deep understanding of deliverability, segmentation, and lifecycle marketing.

Strong analytical mindset — comfortable interpreting data and optimizing based on KPIs.

Excellent written and spoken English.

Extremely organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable managing fast-paced campaign calendars.

Experience with fashion, beauty, or lifestyle eCommerce brands is highly preferred.



Nice to Have

Experience with SMS marketing

Understanding of creative testing and performance frameworks.



Apply

title: TikTok Video Editor ($3,000-$5,000 / month, Fully Remote)
description:
Paid Trial To Complete (Required to Apply, $150 if you pass it!)

When submitting your application, include these 3 trial videos: https://exchange-life-community.notion.site/Editor-Application-Test-Brief-326f1855927780788969ede1d820b810?source=copy_link



NOTE: Applications without the trial will not be considered.



Role Overview



We are looking for a highly creative and results-driven Performance Video Editor to join our team. Your mission will be to create high-performing organic video for Instagram and TikTok that don't look like ads. If you have a knack for creating content that stops the scroll and engages audiences, we want to talk to you.



This is a long-term, fully remote position for an editor who is passionate about the intersection of creativity and data, and is excited by the opportunity to have their work directly impact business results.



What You'll Do:



- Edit raw footage into compelling, fast-paced short-form video tailored for organic TikToks and Instagram Reels.

- Incorporate viral trends, engaging hooks, and retention-focused pacing to maximize performance.

- Add dynamic captions, relevant B-roll, and sound design to create a native viewing experience.

- Collaborate with our marketing team to test new creative concepts and iterate on winning ads to scale campaigns.

- Analyze ad performance to understand what resonates with the audience and apply those insights to future edits.



Who We're Looking For:



- A Viral Content Creator: You have proven experience creating organic short-form videos (TikToks, Reels) that have achieved significant reach and engagement. You understand what makes content shareable and how to capture attention in the first three seconds.

- A Performance-Minded Editor: You are excited by the idea of your creative work driving measurable results. Experience editing direct-response or paid social ads is a major plus.

- CapCut or Premiere Pro Whiz: You are highly proficient in a fast-paced editing workflow using modern tools.

- Excellent Communicator: You have strong English skills and are reliable, detail-oriented, and can work independently.

- Available & Ready: You have a perfect internet connection and are available to dedicate 3-4 hours daily to this role.

- This is a part-time remote role requiring approximately 24 hours per week (around 4 hours per day, Monday to Saturday), with the potential to grow into a full-time position based on performance.



Compensation & Growth: Earn Based on Performance



We believe in rewarding top talent for outstanding results. This role offers a unique compensation structure designed to give you significant earning potential.



- Base Rate: You will start with a competitive base rate of $10 per hour (596 PHP / hour)

- Performance Bonuses: On top of your hourly rate, you will earn substantial monthly bonuses for creating viral videos and "winning" ads that meet or exceed performance targets. Our bonus structure is uncapped.

- Earning Potential: Our top-performing editors consistently earn $3,000 - $5,000+ per month by creating ads that convert.



This is not a gig. It is a long-term partnership. Most of our editors have been with us for over a year, and we are committed to investing in your growth and success.



Why Join Our Team?



- Fully Remote: Work from anywhere in the world.

- Flexible Schedule: Manage your own hours and workflow.

- Direct Impact: See your creative work translate directly into business success and your own earnings.

- Growth & Stability: Join a team that values long-term relationships and provides ongoing training and opportunities.

title: Video Editor
description:
Video Editor – Paid Ads (DTC Apparel Brand)

Location: Remote

Type: Full-Time

Industry: DTC E-commerce / Apparel



What We’re Looking For:

We’re looking for a Video Editor with strong experience creating high-performing paid ads for DTC brands.

Our brand grows through paid social ads, landing pages, and campaigns, meaning the videos we produce must stop the scroll, capture attention instantly, and drive conversions.

You’ll join a fast-moving team working closely with marketing, creative, and growth, producing video creatives used across Meta, TikTok, and other paid platforms.

This role is ideal for someone who has already worked with direct-to-consumer brands, especially within:

* fashion

* apparel

* lingerie / underwear

* female-focused brands

You should understand that in DTC, video editing is not just about aesthetics — it directly impacts performance.



Your Role

Your main focus will be creating high-performing short-form video creatives for paid ads.



Paid Social Ads

Edit scroll-stopping short-form videos used for paid marketing across:

* TikTok

* Instagram Reels

* Meta Ads

You should understand:

* strong hooks in the first 1–3 seconds

* pacing for retention

* visual storytelling for conversion

* ad structures that drive performance



UGC Ad Editing

Edit UGC-style ads that feel native and authentic.

This includes:

* testimonial style videos

* product demonstrations

* problem / solution formats

* lifestyle storytelling

The edits should feel natural, fast-paced, and platform-native.



Creative Iteration

Work with the team to create multiple variations of ads for testing, including:

* new hooks

* different openings

* different pacing or formats

This is a performance-driven creative environment, where we continuously test and improve creatives.



Trend & Format Adaptation

Stay on top of:

* TikTok trends

* viral formats

* editing styles

* trending sounds

and adapt them into paid ad creatives.



Required Experience

This role requires experience editing videos for DTC brands.

You must have experience creating:

* paid social ads

* UGC-style ads

* short-form video content

* TikTok / Reels style edits

Strong preference for editors who have worked with:

* fashion brands

* apparel brands

* lingerie or underwear brands

* female-focused brands



Editing Skills

You should have strong understanding of:

* scroll-stopping hooks

* retention-driven editing

* pacing and storytelling

* conversion-driven ad formats

* UGC style editing

We are looking for editors who understand how video creative affects performance metrics like CTR, watch time, and conversions.



Tools & Workflow

Please mention the tools you work with.

Typical tools include:

* Adobe Premiere Pro

* After Effects

* CapCut Pro

* Final Cut Pro

AI tools and workflows are a big advantage, including:

* Nano Banana

* Runway

* ElevenLabs (AI voiceover)

* Descript

* Midjourney

* other AI creative tools



What We Offer

* Full-time position

* Competitive salary

* Performance-based bonuses

* Work with a fast-growing DTC apparel brand

* Be part of a creative and ambitious team

* Long-term opportunity to grow with the company



How To Apply (Important)

To apply, please include:

1. Your CV

2. Portfolio or examples of previous work

3. Examples of:

* paid social ads

* UGC ads

* short-form video creatives

4. A list of DTC brands you have worked with

5. A short explanation of what you could contribute to our brand

6. The editing tools and AI tools you work with



To confirm you read the full posting, include the word:

"Apperal"

at the end of your application.

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.



If you have experience editing high-performing creatives for DTC brands, we’re excited to see your work.

 is one of our main revenue channels, and we’re looking for a top-tier Klaviyo operator to own it.

title: Product Lister (Shopify / Poky / Kiwi Size Chart)
description:
Job Description:  

We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Product Lister to join our e-commerce team. Your main responsibility will be to accurately import and optimize products on our Shopify store. This role is essential to maintaining a clean, high-converting product catalog.



How the workflow works:  

- We provide product links via a shared sheet  

- You import these products into our Shopify store using Poky  

- After importing, you carefully review and optimize each product before publishing  



Your Responsibilities:  

- Import products from provided links using Poky  

- Check and optimize product titles (clear, clean, and optimized for conversions)  

- Review and improve product descriptions (using ChatGPT when needed)  

- Verify available sizes and colors  

- Ensure all product links and variants are correct  

- Create and add size charts using Kiwi Size Chart  

- Double-check product images and overall presentation  

- Ensure everything is clean, consistent, and ready for customers  

- Mark completed products in the sheet once fully finalized  



Requirements:  

- Experience with Shopify (required)  

- Experience with Poky (product import app)  

- Experience with Kiwi Size Chart (size chart app)  

- Comfortable using ChatGPT for improving product descriptions  

- Strong attention to detail  

- Ability to follow instructions and work independently  

- Basic understanding of e-commerce and product optimization  



What We Offer:  

- Long-term opportunity for the right person  

- Consistent workflow and clear instructions  

- Performance-based growth and rewards

We are looking for someone who takes pride in their work and is willing to grow with us long-term. If you are consistent, detail-focused, and motivated, this role is a strong fit.

Please share your experience with Shopify, Poky, Kiwi Size Chart, and product listing, along with examples (if available).

description:
I run an agency in the
 marketing for ecommerce space. We help ecommerce brands generate more revenue and profit using
 and SMS (using tools like Klaviyo).



We have a Youtube channel where I do talking head videos and share valuable insights to help ecom brand owners generate more revenue through
.



I'm looking for a very skilled video editor to own the post-production process.



What you'll be editing:

- Youtube videos (10–30 min each, talking head + slides/screen recordings).

- Youtube Shorts + Instagram Reels cut from the long-form videos + recorded separately (1-3 minutes).

- Occasional other long and short-form content as needed.

- Knowing how to create high-converting thumbnails is a BIG PLUS. I'll share our formula with you.



What the role may grow into:

- Help with video content research and idea generation.

- Feedback on optimizing and improving our videos.

- Helping with content repurposing across platforms.



What I'm looking for:

- You edit fast without sacrificing quality: clean cuts, good pacing, punchy energy.

- You understand retention editing (hooks, jump cuts, zooms, text on screen, b-roll placement, animations) for YouTube specifically.

- You can take a raw recording + a script/outline and deliver a polished video with minimal back-and-forth.

- You have experience editing talking-head or educational YouTube content (not just vlogs or gaming).

- You're reliable, communicative, and meet deadlines without being chased.

- You know Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve, and are good with motion graphics or After Effects.

- Bonus: you're familiar with AI video tools so we can always continue innovating and improving.



Details:

- Full-time for the right candidate.

- Paid monthly, fixed rate (we'll discuss based on experience).

- Long-term role. I'm not looking for a freelancer for a one-off project. My team has been with me for years.

- You'll need to be available for async communication during my working hours (CET timezone)



How to Apply (READ THIS CAREFULLY)

I will get a lot of applications for this role. To make sure I only speak with serious candidates, please do ALL 4 of the following:



- Start your application with the word "EDITOR2026" so I know you actually read this post. Applications that don't start with this word will be disregarded.

- Send your 3 BEST Youtube talking-head videos that you worked on so I can assess your skills. Please don't send me your entire portfolio. Just your 3 best videos. 1-2 Shorts/Reels are welcome as well.

- Answer this question in 2–3 sentences: Pick one of the videos you linked above. What is one specific editing choice you made in that video to improve viewer retention, and why?

- Search for
 marketing for ecommerce OR Klaviyo for ecommerce videos on Youtube and give me 1 video that you really like and 2 quick suggestions on how you can improve it.



I'm looking forward to your application!

title: Looking for a Top-Level Klaviyo email/SMS marketing strategist/account manager
description:
We are a fast growing
 marketing agency working with ecommerce brands in different niches.



We're looking for the best Klaviyo strategist to join our team. This is a long term position that will lead to full time work for the right candidate. The ideal candidate must have experience:



1) With the Klaviyo platform. You MUST have a few years of experience working with Klaviyo. Working with other platforms like Attentive, SMSBump or PostScript is a plus.



2) Creating effective
/SMS marketing strategies that will lead to increased revenue for our ecommerce clients.



3) We already have tea
mbers for graphic design, copywriting and implementing everything on Klaviyo. Your responsibility will be crafting an effective strategy for each client and then creating and assigning all the tasks for the
s to our tea
mbers as an account manager for each client. You will oversee the implementation process from beginning to end. This will be the main task.



4) Eventually, you'll also be talking to clients directly, so a great command of the English language is required.



5) Agencies must not apply. You must be an individual freelancer/employee who will work on our clients accounts and not outsource it to someone else. Our founder will be working with you directly.



THIS IS NOT an entry level position. You must have proven experience creating and implementing highly effective strategies for ecommerce brands.



This is a great opportunity for someone who lives and breathes
/SMS marketing for ecommerce and is motivated to become the best strategist in the industry. We care about our clients deeply and we want to provide a world-class service.



To make sure you read the post, start your application with the word STRATEGIST.



Looking forward to seeing what you come up with.

title: Meta Ads Expert Needed (Quick Fix – No Impressions Issue)
description:
Job Title: Meta Ads Expert Needed (Quick Fix – No Impressions Issue)



Job Description:I’m looking for an experienced Meta 
/Instagram) Ads specialist to help troubleshoot a campaign that is currently not delivering at all (0 impressions, no ad spend).



This is a quick gig — I just need someone who knows what they’re doing to identify the issue and fix it so my ads start running.



What I need help with:



Diagnose why my campaign is showing no impressions (— instead of data)



Ensure my Meta Pixel + Conversion API are properly set up and firing



Check campaign, ad set, and ad-level settings for any delivery issues



Make necessary adjustments so ads start spending and getting impressions



Confirm everything is working correctly before finishing



Requirements:



Proven experience with Meta Ads (especially troubleshooting delivery issues)



Strong understanding of Meta Pixel + Events Manager + Conversion API



Ability to quickly identify and fix problems



Clear communication (explain what was wrong and what was fixed)



Budget:



$20 USD (fixed price — quick troubleshooting task)



Goal:By the end of this gig, I want to see:



Ads actively delivering



Impressions showing (no more “—”)



Ad spend starting



Additional Info:



This is for an eCommerce product (mobility scooter niche)



Campaign is already set up — just needs troubleshooting

title: YouTube Video Editor Needed — Personal Brand / Fitness / Lifestyle
description:
I'm a content creator based in Australia building a personal brand on YouTube. I document my fitness journey, talk about nutrition, and share the honest reality of building a life and a business at the same time.

I film regularly but I need someone to handle the edit so I can stay focused on creating.

What you'll be editing:

Long form YouTube vlogs, roughly 10 to 20 minutes. Talking head footage, gym footage, voiceover, b-roll. The style is honest, real, and engaging. Not over produced. Think storytelling first, flashy effects last.

What I need from you:



Clean cuts and good pacing

Subtitles and captions

Simple graphics and text overlays where needed

Colour grading

Music selection that fits the vibe

Deliver a ready to upload file



What I'm looking for:



Experience editing YouTube long form content

A portfolio or examples of past work

Reliable, communicates well, meets deadlines

Able to work independently once you understand the style



Rate and hours:

Part time to start. Please send your rate per video and your monthly retainer rate. Open to discussing based on experience.

To apply:

Send me 2 to 3 examples of YouTube videos you have edited and a short note about yourself.

title: Virtual Assistant (Tech-Savvy | SaaS + Real Estate | Growth-Focused Team)
description:
Overview

We’re building a high-level SaaS platform in the real estate space and are looking for a sharp, organized, and tech-savvy Virtual Assistant to support our team.

You’ll work directly with the CEO and Lead Engineer, helping manage operations, content, and day-to-day execution across multiple projects.

This is not a task-only role. We’re looking for someone who can think, contribute ideas, and help us improve systems, not just follow instructions.



What You’ll Be Doing

Manage and organize tasks across project management tools

Assist with CRM management (GoHighLevel)

Communicate and coordinate via Slack

Support social media posting and content organization

Help manage multiple projects simultaneously

Follow SOPs, systems, and workflows accurately

Assist with onboarding tasks and occasional client-facing communication

Provide feedback and suggestions to improve processes



Who We’re Looking For

Tech-savvy and comfortable learning new tools quickly

Experience with tools like GoHighLevel, Slack, and project management platforms

Strong written and spoken English

Highly organized with strong attention to detail

Has a good eye for design and presentation

Able to manage multiple priorities without getting overwhelmed

Proactive and confident sharing ideas or improvements

Professional and well-presented (for potential onboarding calls)



Work Environment

You’ll be working directly with leadership (CEO + Lead Engineer)

Fast-paced but structured environment

Clear systems and support will be provided

You will be trained and given time to ramp up

We are focused on setting you up to succeed

This role is designed to be challenging in a good way, not overwhelming.

 We value clarity, communication, and execution.



What Success Looks Like

Tasks are completed accurately and on time

Communication is clear and proactive

You take initiative without needing constant direction

You actively look for ways to improve workflows

You become a reliable operator within the team



How to Apply

To be considered, please submit the following:

Your resume

A portfolio (if applicable)

A brief summary of your experience with relevant tools (GoHighLevel, Slack, etc.)

A short loom introducing yourself



Hiring Process

Initial review of your application

Quick call with our team to assess fit

Short test project

Final interview with leadership

Offer and onboarding



Final Note

We are building something meaningful and long-term.

 We’re not just hiring for a role, we’re bringing on someone who can grow with us.

If you’re organized, proactive, and ready to contribute at a high level, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Administrative Manager
description:
Administrative Manager (Full-Time | Remote | Residential Construction)



Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time

Employment Type: Full-Time (40 hours/week)



About Us:

We are a growing residential construction and development company focused on high-quality infill housing projects. We are a small, high-performing team that takes pride in delivering exceptional results for our clients. Every tea
mber plays a meaningful role and is trusted to take ownership of their work. We value people who are highly organized, detail-oriented, proactive, and comfortable working independently within well-defined systems and processes. Our culture is built around accountability, clear communication, and supporting one another so everyone can perform at a high level. This role is best suited for someone who enjoys taking initiative, keeping things organized, and being part of a professional team that holds itself to a high standard.



Compensation:

We offer competitive full-time compensation based on experience and performance. We value long-term tea
mbers and reward reliability, strong performance, and growth within the company. This position is best suited for someone looking for stable, long-term work with a professional team, not short-term freelance work.



Position Overview:

We are hiring a full-time Administrative Manager to oversee and coordinate the administrative operations of our company. This role serves as the organizational backbone of the team—managing communication, scheduling, documentation, and internal coordination while ensuring a smooth and professional experience for both our team and our clients.



Key Responsibilities:

• Manage company and executive
 inboxes and calendars

• Communicate with U.S.-based customers by phone and

• Schedule consultations, meetings, and follow-ups

• Maintain organized digital files and documentation

• Track compliance items such as insurance certificates, lien releases, and tax filings

• Monitor deadlines and follow up with tea
mbers to keep projects moving

• Lead weekly tea
etings and help maintain accountability across the team

• Help improve and maintain company systems, organization, and workflows



Required Qualifications:

• Excellent spoken and written English

• Proficiency in Microsoft Word & Excel

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Able to work independently and manage responsibilities proactively



When applying, please address your application message to David, and begin your application message with the phrase Systems Create Success. Also please include a 30–60 second video recording of yourself describing your relevant work experience.



Thank you!

We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Content Creator
description:
I’m looking for a content creator based in the Philippines who can help bring my ideas to life through short-form video.

This role is focused on creating Instagram Reels, YouTube shorts and TikToks that are engaging, clear, and actually connect with people, not just add to the noise online.

If you understand pacing, hooks, and how to turn raw content into something people want to watch, keep reading.



About the Role

Part-time: 10–20 hours per week

Fully remote (Philippines-based)

Focused on editing and posting Reels, Shorts and TikToks

Opportunity to grow with a fast-moving real estate investing brand



What You’ll Do

Edit short-form videos (Reels, TikToks, Shorts)

Turn long-form content (calls, trainings, clips) into engaging short-form videos

Add captions, hooks, trending sounds, and visuals that increase retention

Post and schedule content across platforms

Help test and improve content performance over time



What We’re Looking For (Must-Have)

This is not an entry-level role. We’re specifically looking for someone with hands-on Reels experience for clients.

You should:

Have a portfolio with 100+ Reels (client work preferred)

Be skilled with CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar tools

Know how to create:

Strong hooks

Clean, readable captions

Engaging edits using trending formats

Understand how to repurpose long-form content into short-form

Have experience managing end-to-end Reels production (editing ? captioning ? posting)

Reels are a core part of this brand’s growth strategy, so this level of experience is essential.



Compensation (Philippines-Based)

We are looking for top-tier talent, not entry-level.

$6–$12/hour depending on experience and quality

Approx. $480–$960/month (part-time)

Opportunity for growth and increased hours based on performance

???? We are open to paying more for someone exceptional who can move fast and produce high-quality content consistently.



What We’re Looking For (Beyond Skills)

Detail-oriented (this matters more than you think)

Proactive and takes initiative

Fast and execution-focused (not stuck in perfectionism)

Strong sense of energy (content should not feel flat or boring)

Bonus: Worked in real estate, investing, or property management 



This Is NOT For You If

You apply to everything without reading instructions

You need constant hand-holding

You overthink instead of executing

Your content feels generic or low-energy



How to Apply (Read Carefully)

Please include:

Links to your portfolio (must include Reels work)

A 1–2 minute video telling us:

Who you are

What you would bring to the team

Why you’re interested in this role

If the video is missing, your application will not be reviewed. Send in any way possible: Google drive, Dropbox, Loom, etc.



Why This Role Matters

You’ll be helping share real stories, real wins, and real strategies that are helping people take action in real estate.

This isn’t just content for the sake of posting. It’s about impact, clarity, and momentum.



If you’re interested, apply here or
 us at 

If you know someone great, send this their way.

nts

title: Creative Strategist & Video Editor (AI Ads)
description:
We are a fast-growing SaaS company leveraging artificial intelligence to help content creators produce high-performing videos at scale.



We are currently in a scaling phase and are looking for a Creative Strategist & Video Editor who can take ownership of our ad production pipeline from A to Z.



Your role is to research, replicate, and produce high-converting video ads inspired by top-performing creatives in the market.



This is a hybrid role combining:



creative thinking (hooks, angles, concepts)

execution (video editing & assembly)

AI-assisted production (image/video generation tools)



Your responsibilities

Analyze competitor ads using tools like ad libraries and spy tools

Identify winning patterns (hooks, structures, visuals, angles)

Recreate and adapt high-performing creatives for our brand

Write short, punchy scripts using proven ad structures

Edit short-form videos (TikTok, Reels, etc.)

Use AI tools to generate visuals (images/videos) when needed

Select and assemble visuals (AI, stock, or UGC footage)

Continuously test new hooks, formats, and variations

Deliver a consistent volume of high-quality creatives weekly



How We Work

We use a structured creative system based on modular ad sequences (hook, pain, benefit, etc.).



You will:

receive clear frameworks and processes

use internal tools to assist with scripting and ideation

work with a mix of:

AI-generated visuals

existing creative assets

UGC content (actors if needed)



Your goal is not just to create videos, but to create ads that perform.



We want someone who is:



autonomous and execution-focused

creative but also analytical

fast and detail-oriented

comfortable working with AI tools (or eager to learn)

obsessed with improving and testing



You should be able to go from: idea ? script ? visuals ? final video

title: Senior Shopify Ecommerce Developer (Perfume Website – Full Build, SEO & Linnworks Sync)

See 

Password = dasswxrd

)

s

 accounts using our domain

Forms

Offers

title: AI Agents & Automation Assistant
description:
The LLM & AI Automation Analyst is responsible for managing, monitoring, and continuously improving LLM-powered systems, AI agents, and automations, including chatbot applications.



This role sits at the intersection of AI, data, automation, and operations. You will ensure AI systems deliver accurate, reliable, and context-aware outputs by maintaining knowledge bases, refining prompts, monitoring performance, and building automations and reports. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys analytical thinking, process optimization, and working with evolving AI systems.





Responsibilities include, but are not limited to:

-Maintain and improve LLM-powered agents, including chatbot workflows, prompts, and response logic



-Design, test, and refine prompts to improve accuracy, consistency, and behavior



-Validate agent outputs across edge cases and real-world scenarios



-Curate, organize, and validate structured knowledge bases, FAQs, and internal documentation used by AI systems



-Ensure knowledge sources remain accurate, up to date, and logically structured



-Review AI conversations and agent outputs to identify errors, gaps, and logic failures



-Define, track, and document quality metrics for AI outputs



-Propose corrective actions based on recurring issues



-Track AI usage, accuracy, resolution rates, escalation rates, and user satisfaction



-Analyze trends and root causes behind performance changes



-Translate insights into actionable improvements



-Build formulas, scripts, and automations to improve AI workflows, reporting, and monitoring



-Use Google Apps Script and APIs to automate repetitive processes



-Assist in creating dashboards and reports to monitor AI performance and adoption



-Ensure leadership has clear visibility into system health and impact



-Maintain clear documentation of AI logic, workflows, automations, and improvement roadmap



-Partner with Data, Operations, HR, and Leadership to align AI capabilities with business needs



-Proactively identify opportunities to improve AI accuracy, efficiency, and reliability







Qualifications

Required:

-1+ year experience working with LLMs, chatbots, or AI-powered systems



-Strong proficiency in Google Sheets for analysis, tracking, and reporting



-1+ year experience using formulas and Google Apps Script



-Ability to analyze AI conversations, logs, and performance metrics



-Experience with prompt engineering and evaluation



-Strong attention to detail and quality assurance mindset



-Understanding of data privacy, access control, and responsible AI practices



-Clear written communication and cross-functional collaboration skills



Nice to Have

-Python for automation or data analysis



-Basic SQL for querying logs or analytics data



-Experience with APIs (REST, JSON)



-Familiarity with BI tools or BigQuery







Technical Stack



Languages

-JavaScript (Google Apps Script)

-Python (optional but valuable)

-SQL (basic)



Tools

-Google Apps Script

-Google Sheets Automation

-LLM / AI platforms (internal or third-party)

-API integrations (REST, JSON)



Data & Reporting

-Google Sheets

-BigQuery (optional)

-Dashboards / BI tools





Key Traits

-Highly analytical and detail-oriented



-Curious and passionate about AI and automation



-Process-driven and optimization-focused



-Proactive and self-directed



-Strong ownership mindset



-Comfortable working with ambiguity and evolving systems



 

Benefits & Perks:

-Strong focus on work-life balance



-Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI and automation systems



-Direct impact on product, operations, and customer experience



-Long-term growth path in AI, Data, and Automation



All set to dive into this new adventure?

As an Online Installation Technician, you will play a critical role in remotely supporting the installation of AI systems in the U.S. This is a fully remote contractor position where you will guide on-the-ground technicians through various installation steps, ensuring successful implementation and troubleshooting of any issues that arise. Your expertise in hardware, software, and troubleshooting will be essential in maintaining smooth operations and delivering high-quality support to our partners and customers. Payment for this role is on an hourly basis.



You would bring:

- Excellent Communication Skills: Proficient in English with an easy-to-understand accent, confidence in speaking, and smooth communication skills.

- Technical Equipment: Dedicated work PC with a fast and stable internet connection, sufficient RAM, and adequate memory.

- Experience: Proven experience in handling communication in English, including calls and interactions with various business partners.

- Technical Expertise: Familiarity with hardware, software, and troubleshooting. This role requires candidates who can handle technical tasks beyond basic help, such as adjusting laptop brightness or taking screenshots.

- Stress Management: Ability to remain calm and take control of situations under stress.

- Self-Learning Ability: A fast learner with the capability to research and troubleshoot issues independently before seeking assistance.

- Organizational Skills: Well-organized and detail-oriented approach to work.

- Full-Time Commitment: Willingness to dedicate full time to the role, with the opportunity for growth and development within the company.

- Flexibility: Ability to work long shifts when needed, with the understanding that Field Engineers (FEs) may need to stay late until the job is done.



About the role:

- Remote Position: This is a fully remote job where you will work from your location, managing installations and support virtually.

- Collaboration: Work closely with on-site technicians to complete AI system installations, including troubleshooting issues during the process. You will guide the on-the-ground technician through various installation steps.

- Communication: Effectively communicate with external personnel from our partners and customers as needed.

- Task Management: Handle installation-related tasks assigned by the company.



Please fill out the form so we can get started!

title: Customer Communications Specialist (Educational Supplies)
description:
Employment Type: Independent Contractor

Location: Remote / Work from Home (Philippines)

Working Hours: 8:00 AM to 3:00 PM (Sydney Time), 3 to 5 days per week



About Us & The Role

With over 20 years of success in the industry, we are proud to be the largest and most established operator in our segment, specializing in high-quality school educational supplies.



We are looking for an energetic, confident, and highly motivated Customer Communications Specialist  to join our team on a contract basis. In this work-from-home role, you will report directly to and be fully supported by our Team.



Your primary focus will be making outbound cold calls to our target audience: primary school administrators, childcare educators, and science teachers. You will be the first point of contact, responsible for introducing our business, building relationships with educational professionals, and generating interest in our products.



If you have a naturally happy disposition, love talking to people, and want to work with an industry leader while enjoying local support, we want to hear from you!



Key Responsibilities

Make high-volume outbound cold calls to primary schools, childcare centers, and educational professionals.



Clearly and confidently communicate the value of our educational supplies to generate leads and interest.



Update and maintain accurate customer records and call logs using our CRM software.



Navigate Shopify to reference product catalogs, pricing, or customer data during calls.



Maintain a positive, upbeat, and resilient attitude, even when faced with rejection or busy school schedules.



Work closely with our Team to ensure targets and quality standards are met.



What You Bring to the Table (Requirements)

Exceptional English Skills: You must possess strong, clear, and highly confident spoken English to effectively communicate with Australian educators.



A "Sunny" Disposition: A happy, enthusiastic, and approachable personality is an absolute must for this role!



Experience: Proven experience in outbound cold calling or a similar B2B telemarketing role.

Software Knowledge: Prior experience working with Shopify and navigating CRM software is required.

Reliability: Ability to consistently work between 8:00 AM and 3:00 PM Sydney time, 3 to 5 days a week.



Work-From-Home Technical Requirements

Primary Internet: A stable, high-speed wired internet connection (Minimum 20 Mbps).

Equipment: A reliable PC or laptop (Minimum 8GB RAM, Core i3/Ryzen 3 or equivalent) and a noise-canceling USB headset.

Backups: A reliable backup internet connection (e.g., pocket Wi-Fi or mobile data) and power backup in case of outages.



What We Provide

A fully funded VOIP telephone line to make your calls.

A flexible contract arrangement allowing you to work comfortably from your home.

Direct support and training from a local manager based in PH.

The stability and prestige of working for a 20-year-old industry-leading business.



How to Apply

To apply, please reply with the subject line: "Sunny Educational Caller - [Your Name]".



Please include:



1. Your up-to-date resume highlighting your outbound calling and Shopify/CRM experience.



2. A link to a brief, 1-minute voice recording (using Vocaroo or Google Drive) introducing yourself and explaining why you would be great at speaking with Australian teachers and school administrators. (NOT A GENERIC TEMPLATE)



3. A screenshot of your computer specs and your current internet speed test.



Note: Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.

Supportive team and clear onboarding process





APPLY TODAY AND START WORKING NEXT WEEK MARCH 30

We're hiring a Client Success Manager to own the client relationship from onboarding through capital deployment and beyond.



What You'll Be Doing

Guiding clients through a structured, phase-based program with clear milestones and deliverables

Managing credit repair workflows — disputing inaccuracies, tracking score progress, and coordinating with our credit repair VA

Keeping clients accountable to action items and timelines without hand-holding

Flagging at-risk clients early and escalating to the team when needed

Maintaining clean CRM records and updating client status consistently

Communicating professionally across 
,
, and video calls

1–2+ years of CSM experience specifically at a funding, business credit, or capital access company — this is non-negotiable. We will verify.

Demonstrated experience with credit repair processes (disputes, bureau communications, score monitoring)

Strong written and spoken English

Reliable internet connection and a distraction-free work setup

Comfortable working U.S. business hours (or significant overlap)

Detail-oriented, process-driven, and able to manage multiple active clients simultaneously





What We're Not Looking For



General VA experience rebranded as CSM experience

Anyone who needs to be taught the basics of business credit from scratch
