title: Freelance LinkedIn Sales
description:
We're looking for a freelance, commission-only Sales Representative to help grow Reverie Filmmaking, a creative video production company that helps brands increase revenue and engagement through strategic, story-driven video content.



About the Role



You'll be responsible for prospecting and qualifying new leads among small-to-medium businesses and mid-market companies. Your mission is simple:



• Reach out via calls and Linkedin messages.

• Quality leads - confirm the client's budget, timeline, need, and competition.

• Book qualified meetings with our Creative Director (we handle the close).



What We Offer



• 10% commission on all closed deals — no cap.

• Fully remote - work from anywhere, anytime.

• Flexible schedule - fit sales around your lifestyle.

• Strong creative backing - you'll represent a company with the technical skill and strategic insight to deliver high-performing videos that drive real results for clients.



About Reverie Filmmaking



We're not just videographers - we're video strategists.



Our mission is offer a transparent, no-fluff approach by offering our video quote calculator and close deals on videography for them, which are designed to help them achieve marketing KPI's and see real income in return. 



Ideal Candidate



You are:

• Driven and self-motivated - you thrive on autonomy and results.

• Confident communicator — great on the phone and Linkedin.

• Strategic thinker - you can quickly understand a business's needs



Detail-oriented — you qualify leads thoroughly and only pass along serious prospects.

• Relationship-focused — you enjoy building trust and long-term connections with clients.

• Experienced in B2B sales (preferably in creative services, marketing, or media - but not essential).



How to Apply



Send us a short message introducing yourself and explaining:

• Why you're interested in selling for a creative agency

• Any relevant B2B sales experience

• Your approach to cold outreach and lead qualification



We'll get back to promising candidates to set up an intro call.

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter For Medspa Marketing Agency
description:
We are hiring an Appointment Setter / Cold Caller for our agency that helps medspas and aesthetic clinics grow using paid ads and AI infrastructure.



Your main role will be to call cold leads from our CRM and book qualified prospects into a Zoom discovery call with our sales team. You will not be responsible for closing deals. Our team handles the sales calls and closes the clients. Your job is to start conversations, follow the script/process, handle basic objections, and get the appointment booked.



What we provide:

- All leads are provided

- Leads are already loaded into our GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM

- Phone number and calling/software tools are provided

- You do not need to source your own leads



Requirements:

- Previous experience in cold calling, appointment setting, telemarketing, or sales

- Must be 100% fluent in English with no accent

- Confident speaking on the phone with business owners

- Strong communication and follow-up skills

- Comfortable working inside GoHighLevel (GHL) or similar CRM

- Must have your own computer/laptop and reliable internet

- Ready to start ASAP



Schedule:

Minimum 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM EST

Minimum 5-6 days per week



Compensation:

Salary, or

Base salary + commission



When applying, please send the following via WhatsApp to
. 

- Your resume showing previous cold calling experience

- A short voice recording introducing yourself and explaining your experience.

- Your expected hourly pay



We are looking for someone reliable, hungry, and experienced who can help our team consistently book qualified discovery calls.

title: Marketing, Automation & Executive Virtual Assistant
description:
We’re looking for an experienced Marketing, Automation & Executive Virtual Assistant to support a growing wellness coaching business.



This role is for someone who can work independently, take initiative, and deliver high-quality work without constant guidance. You should understand branding, create clean designs in Canva, and know how to build effective sales pages and funnels — not just assemble content.



You must be organized, detail-oriented, and reliable with deadlines. Strong communication is important — you should provide updates proactively and be easy to work with. A stable internet connection and consistent availability are required.

Most importantly, you understand the bigger picture and look for ways to improve systems and content, not just complete tasks.



This is not a training role. We’re looking for someone experienced who can contribute immediately and deliver strong results.



Remote (PH Daytime Hours, with occasional overlap for communication)



Job duties and responsibilities:

 

 1. Marketing & Automation (Main Focus)

       - Build and manage funnels, workflows, and
 automations in GoHighLevel

       - Create and update landing pages, forms, and
 sequences

       - Migrate
 lists and campaigns from Flowdesk to GHL

       - Monitor automations and help improve system efficiency



2. Content & Social Media Support

       - Schedule posts for Instagram,
, and LinkedIn

       - Help publish and repurpose content 
s, social posts, lead magnets)

       - Maintain simple content calendars



3. Creative Support

        - Create clean, on-brand visuals using Canva

        - Support graphics for social posts, funnels, and lead magnets



4. Light Admin Support

        - Help with inbox organization and basic
 responses

        - Assist with calendar coordination

        - Organize files in Google Drive

        - Other small admin tasks as needed



Qualifications

     - Proven experience with GoHighLevel (funnels, automations,
 systems)

     - Strong experience creating sales pages and marketing funnels

     - Advanced Canva skills with a strong eye for design and branding

     - Experience in content repurposing and digital marketing workflows

     - Highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive

     - Strong written English communication skills

     - Ability to think critically and execute without step-by-step guidance





If you believe you're a strong fit for this position, please respond with the following:



1. A link to your resume in PDF format. 



       Your resume should include your contact details, a recent professional photo, and a summary of your work experience,  

        emphasizing tasks relevant to this role.



2. A screenshot of your PC specifications and internet speed



3. Your WhatsApp number for easy communication. 



To ensure you've read this message carefully, please include the word "AUTOMATION3" in the subject line of your
.



We look forward to reviewing your application!

title: Graphic Designer – Landing Pages & Conversion Optimization (CRO) | Full-Time | $7–$10/hr
description:
Graphic Designer – Landing Pages & Conversion Optimization (CRO) | Full-Time | $7–$10/hr

Location: Remote (Philippines-based only)

Schedule: Full-Time | Must have overlap with U.S. working hours

Compensation: $7 – $10 USD/hour (based on experience)

Type: Long-Term | Full-Time



ONLY CANDIDATES WITH COMPLETE PORTFOLIO REQUIREMENTS WILL BE SHORTLISTED. 



About the Role

We are hiring a Graphic Designer specializing in Landing Page Design and Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) to help create high-performing digital experiences that generate leads, drive sales, and increase engagement.



Key Responsibilities

Landing Page Design

Design high-converting landing pages for marketing campaigns, product launches, and lead generation

Create layouts that guide users toward a clear call-to-action (CTA)

Ensure mobile-first and responsive design

Build visually compelling pages that align with campaign goals



Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)

Apply CRO principles such as:

Visual hierarchy

Strategic CTA placement

Scroll depth optimization

Trust signals and credibility elements

Social proof

Urgency and scarcity elements

You will also collaborate on A/B testing strategies to improve performance.



User Experience (UX)

Improve landing page usability and flow

Identify friction points that reduce conversion

Design pages with clear user journeys in mind



Analytics & Optimization

Work with marketing teams to review performance data

Design A/B test variations for landing pages and funnels

Iterate designs based on real performance insights



Marketing Collaboration

Collaborate with copywriters, paid media teams, and growth marketers

Ensure landing pages align with campaign messaging and strategy



Required Skills & Experience

CRO & Landing Page Design

Marketing Knowledge

Design Tools



Portfolio Requirements

Applicants must include portfolio examples showing:

Landing pages

Sales pages

Lead generation funnels

A/B test design variations



Bonus if you can show:

Before/after performance improvements

Conversion rate increases

CRO case studies



To Apply

Please submit:

A viewable link to your updated resume

A portfolio showing landing pages or funnel designs

A short paragraph explaining:

Your experience with conversion-focused design

Your role in any A/B tests or CRO improvements



Subject Line: CRO Landing Page Designer – [Your Name]

title: Sales Executive – Entertainment & Media Technology (LED Video) Sales Executive – Entertainment & Media Technology (LED V
description:
Job Title: Sales Executive – Entertainment & Media Technology (LED Video)

Location: Metro Manila, Philippines



About ExtraPro by Trustfall:

ExtraPro by Trustfall is a leading design and technology firm providing innovative audiovisual solutions, with a focus on custom LED video technology for entertainment, mixed-use development, hospitality, casino, retail, and digital out-of-home media sectors. Our team is committed to delivering exceptional AVL experiences that seamlessly combine technology, creativity, and operational excellence.

We are seeking a highly driven Sales Executive to grow our business across the Philippines by leveraging industry expertise, a strong client network, and a passion for entertainment and media technology.



Key Responsibilities:

- Develop and execute strategic sales plans to achieve revenue targets for LED video and AV technology solutions in the entertainment, media, and commercial sectors.

- Build and maintain strong relationships with key clients, including venues, casinos, entertainment providers, digital media operators, developers, and other relevant stakeholders.

- Leverage your existing network of contacts (rolodex) in the AVL space to generate new business opportunities.

- Manage the full sales cycle, including lead generation, prospecting, proposals, presentations, and closing deals.

- Collaborate with internal teams, including engineering, project management, and marketing, to ensure client requirements are understood and delivered.

- Maintain accurate and up-to-date client records, sales activity, and forecasts using CRM tools.

- Monitor market trends, competitor activity, and emerging technologies to identify opportunities for business expansion.

- Attend industry events, exhibitions, and client meetings as needed.



Required Skills & Qualifications:

Experience: Minimum 5 years in AV, lighting, or entertainment technology sales, with a strong emphasis on LED video technology.



Technical Knowledge: In-depth understanding of audiovisual systems, LED video displays, projection, digital signage, and related technologies. Experience in entertainment venues, casinos, or digital out-of-home media is a strong plus.



Client Network: Established relationships within the AV/entertainment technology industry in the Philippines, preferably in Metro Manila.



Sales Skills: Proven ability to drive revenue, close deals, and manage complex sales cycles.



CRM Proficiency: Experience using CRM platforms to track leads, opportunities, and customer interactions.



Preferred Qualifications:

- Experience in project-based sales for entertainment or commercial AVL installations.

- Familiarity with budget management and sales forecasting.

- Understanding of LED video systems, content management, and integration workflows.

- Multi-lingual abilities, particularly Tagalog and English, are a plus.



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary with performance-based incentives.

- We offer a competitive sales commission structure designed to reward performance and incentivize growth, ensuring our tea
mbers are recognized and compensated for their contributions to business success.

- Opportunity to work with cutting-edge AV technology in high-profile entertainment and commercial projects.

- Collaborative, innovative, and growth-oriented company culture.

- Professional development opportunities in the AV, media, and entertainment technology space.



To Apply:

Please submit your resume, cover letter, and any relevant portfolio or project examples highlighting your experience with LED video and AV sales.



Self-Motivation: Highly proactive, goal-oriented, and capable of working independently in a fast-paced environment.



Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills; ability to present technical solutions to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.



Education: Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Engineering, or a related field preferred, though equivalent industry experience will be considered.

title: Amazon Ads Specialist (Book Marketing)
description:
We are seeking an experienced and results-driven Amazon Ads Specialist to take end-to-end ownership of advertising campaigns for a published book.



This role requires both hands-on campaign management and strategic optimization, with a clear goal of achieving and sustaining a minimum 20% ROI while building a scalable system our team can manage internally.



Scope of Work



- Perform a full audit of existing Amazon ad campaigns (structure, keywords, bids, performance)

- Take full ownership of campaign management, including:

        > Campaign creation and restructuring

        > Daily monitoring and optimization

        > Budget allocation and bid adjustments

- Optimize keyword targeting, match types, and search term harvesting

- Continuously test and scale campaigns to improve performance and profitability

- Identify and eliminate wasted ad spend



Performance Goals

- Achieve and maintain a minimum 20% ROI

- Improve key metrics:

- Increase consistent and scalable book sales



Deliverables & Timeline



First 30 Days

- Campaign audit + restructuring plan

- Initial optimizations implemented



30–60 Days

- Performance stabilization

- Early ROI improvements



60–90 Days

- Scalable and optimized campaign structure

- ROI target (20%+) actively achieved or trending



Knowledge Transfer (Required)

- Provide step-by-step guidance for the internal team, including:

        > Loom/video walkthroughs or live sessions

        > Simple SOPs for campaign management



Ideal Candidate

- Proven experience with Amazon Ads for books (KDP required — non-negotiable)

- Demonstrated success in achieving strong ROI or ACOS targets

- Strong analytical and optimization skills

- Ability to translate strategy into simple, actionable steps

- Experience in coaching or consulting is highly preferred



Engagement: Project-based (with potential for ongoing role based on results)



To be considered, please include:



- Examples of Amazon KDP/book campaigns you’ve managed

- Key results (ACOS, ROI, sales growth, etc.)

- Brief explanation of your optimization approach

title: Data Analyst + Dashboarding Expert (Power BI / Looker Studio) — Full-Time (Start Immediately)
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a Data Analyst / Dashboarding Specialist who can build and maintain daily dashboards for our business. This role is hands-on and execution-focused: you will turn raw data into clear, decision-ready reporting for management.



This will start as full-time with consistent daily deliverables.



?



Key Responsibilities (Daily / Weekly)



Daily Dashboarding (Core)

 • Build and maintain daily KPI dashboards for leadership

 • Refresh/update dashboards each day (scheduled refresh where possible)

 • Ensure dashboards are accurate, consistent, and easy to interpret

 • Monitor data quality and flag anomalies (missing data, outliers, mismatched totals)



Reporting & Insights

 • Create daily/weekly summaries: “What changed vs yesterday/last week and why?”

 • Track performance trends and identify drivers (sales mix, labour %, COGS, channel performance, etc.)

 • Deliver ad-hoc analysis when leadership asks questions



Data Management

 • Connect and model data from sources such as:

 • Google Sheets / Excel / CSV exports

 • POS exports (Lightspeed/Square or similar)

 • Delivery platforms / marketing data (if provided)

 • Create clean data models (tables, relationships, measures/KPIs)

 • Document metric definitions and dashboard logic so reporting is consistent



?



Tools & Skills Required



You must be strong in at least one of the following:

 • Power BI (DAX, Power Query, data modeling, scheduled refresh, RLS optional)

 • Google Looker Studio (formerly Data Studio) + Google Sheets/BigQuery connectors



Must-have capabilities

 • Building dashboards with drill-downs, filters, date controls

 • KPI design: clarity, hierarchy, usability for non-technical managers

 • Data cleaning and transformation (Power Query or equivalent)

 • Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills

 • Good communication: explain insights simply



Nice to have

 • SQL (BigQuery/MySQL/Postgres)

 • Experience with hospitality / multi-site operations reporting

 • Automation mindset (reduce manual reporting where possible)



?



What Success Looks Like (First 30 Days)

 • Dashboards are live and used daily by management

 • KPIs and definitions are standardized

 • Daily reporting becomes faster, more reliable, and more insightful

 • Data issues are identified early and corrected with clear documentation



?



Working Style

 • Remote, full-time

 • Daily communication and check-ins

 • You must be responsive and consistent—this role supports daily business decisions



?



How to Apply (Answer These)

 1. Which dashboard tool are you strongest in: Power BI or Looker Studio?

 2. Share 2–3 dashboard examples (screenshots or links) and explain what KPIs they track

 3. What data sources have you connected to before?

 4. Are you comfortable building a data model + measures (not just charts)?

 5. What is your expected monthly salary for full-time?



?



Skills Test Task (Required)



Shortlisted candidates will complete a test dashboard using a provided dataset and KPI requirements.



Note: The test task will be unpaid and requires you to design a dashboard from a specific dataset.



Deliverables for the test:

 • Dashboard file/link (Power BI PBIX or Looker Studio report link)

 • Short written explanation: data model, KPIs, assumptions, and how to use the dashboard

title: Graphic Designer + Social Video Editor (Canva / InDesign)
description:
About Us

We’re a busy restaurant group in Melbourne (hospitality). We’re looking for a reliable, long-term Graphic Designer + Video Editor who can consistently produce polished, on-brand marketing assets for in-store and social media.



What You’ll Create (Weekly / Ongoing)



Print + In-Store

 • A3/A4 Posters (promotions, events, specials)

 • Table Talkers (A5 / DL / tent cards)

 • Menu inserts / flyers (as needed)

 • Digital screen creatives (TV slideshow / landscape & portrait)



Digital + Social

 • Instagram posts + stories

 • Simple motion graphics (optional but great)

 • Short-form video edits for Reels/TikTok/FB:

 • Cutdowns, captions, music syncing, basic transitions

 • Brand overlays (logo, pricing, CTA)

 • Export in correct formats + sizes



Tools You Must Be Comfortable With

 • Canva (fast turnarounds using brand templates)

 • Adobe InDesign (print-ready files, margins/bleeds)

 • Bonus: Photoshop/Illustrator

 • Video: CapCut / Premiere Pro / Final Cut (any is fine if results are great)



Requirements (Important)

 • Strong layout + typography (hospitality promos must look premium)

 • Can follow brand rules (fonts, spacing, colors, logo use)

 • Understand print basics: CMYK / bleed / crop marks / press-ready PDF

 • Fast, clear communicator + consistent delivery

 • Must provide a portfolio with BOTH:

 • Print samples (posters/table talkers/menus)

 • Social samples (posts + short-form video)



Deliverables / File Handoff

 • Canva share links (editable)

 • InDesign packaged files (where relevant)

 • Print-ready PDFs (with bleed)

 • Social exports (1080x1350, 1080x1920, 1920x1080, etc.)

 • Organized filenames and folders per project/week



Work Setup

 • Part-time ongoing (monthly retainer or weekly hours)

 • Typical tasks: 3–8 design assets/week + 2–6 short videos/week (varies)

 • Turnaround: usually 24–72 hours depending on the request



To Apply (Please Answer These)

 1. Link to your portfolio (include print + video)

 2. What tools do you use for design + video?

 3. What’s your turnaround time for:

 • 1 poster

 • 1 Reel (15–30 sec)

 4. Are you comfortable with print-ready PDFs (bleed/crop marks)?

 5. Your hourly rate or preferred monthly retainer



Test Task (unpaid)

Shortlisted candidates will do a paid sample:

 • 1 A4 promo poster + 1 IG story version

OR

 • 1 short Reel edit with captions and brand overlay

title: Logo Redesign + Company Brand Kit
description:
We’re launching a new division that will operate as a sister company to our existing business, and we’re looking for a logo and full brand kit to support the rollout.



The new brand should feel aligned with our current company so both divisions appear cohesive, but with a distinct color direction to clearly set them apart. We’re drawn to incorporating purple into the new design, but are looking for a more refined, modern layout overall.

Please submit logo concepts and ideas as part of the testing.

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant (Sales Admin & Property Management – AU Experience)
description:
We are seeking a Real Estate Virtual Assistant with Australian sales administration and property management experience to support a growing real estate team.



The successful candidate will assist with sales campaigns, CRM management, marketing coordination, and day-to-day property management tasks. This role requires strong organisation, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple workflows in a fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities:

(Sales)

• Research buyers and property owners using CoreLogic or Pricefinder

• Schedule and confirm open homes and inspections

• Respond to buyer, vendor, tenant, and landlord enquiries

• Prepare property ads, brochures, and marketing materials

• Upload listings, media, and data into the CRM

• Create and schedule social media posts (Coming Soon, Just Listed, Just Sold)

• Set up and manage Meta ads and track campaign performance

• Coordinate photography, videos, floorplans, and signboards

• Manage
s and flag urgent items for the team

• Enter and maintain vendor and property data in the CRM

• Track commissions, VPA/vendor payments, and trust-related requests

• Ensure contracts, approvals, and compliance documents are complete and accurate

• Communicate with vendors (welcome
s, updates, confirmations)

• Maintain compliance checklists and ensure documentation is properly filed



(Property Management)

• Assist with tenant and landlord enquiries and general property management support

• Send notices (entry, rent increase, lease renewals)

• Manage maintenance requests and coordinate with trades

• Schedule inspections (routine, entry, vacate) and confirm appointments

• Prepare lease documents and manage tenant onboarding

• Update rent roll, property data, and tenant records in the CRM

• Track lease renewals, arrears, and compliance requirements

• Liaise with contractors, track jobs, and manage work orders

• Upload invoices and match expenses to properties

• Maintain accurate property files and compliance records

• Send reports and updates to landlords



Qualifications:

• Proven experience as a Real Estate Virtual Assistant or Administrator

• Experience in both sales administration and property management (AU experience required)

• Familiarity with CoreLogic, Pricefinder, or similar tools

• Experience with real estate CRMs and property management systems

• Strong understanding of Australian real estate processes and compliance

• Excellent written and spoken English communication skills

• Highly organised with strong attention to detail

• Reliable, proactive, and able to work independently

title: VA who can find b-roll for short form videos
description:
B-Roll Specialist (Not a Full Editor)



I’m looking for someone who is excellent at selecting B-roll for short-form content.



Not a full video editor.



I already use tools like Veed and Submagic for captions, zooms, and transitions. The bottleneck is simple: finding the right B-roll that actually enhances the message.



What I Need



Someone who:



Has a strong understanding of social media content

Has great attention to detail

Can match visuals to the exact point being made (not just “kind of related”)

Takes pride in making the final product feel sharp and intentional

Is friendly and nice to talk to. If we're going to work together every day I like spending time with people who are nice! lol



I’ve worked with people on this before, and the biggest issue is this:



They pick B-roll that’s generic, random, or slightly off.



That’s not what I’m looking for.



I want someone who actually thinks about the video, understands the message, and chooses visuals that make it better.



To apply, please complete this short test:



Video:





Instructions:



Add B-roll to this video

Don’t worry about captions, transitions, or polishing it

I only care about the choices you make for B-roll



This video has already been edited and posted, so this is NOT for free work.

It’s just to see how you think.



If your instincts match what I’m looking for, we’ll move forward quickly.



Thanks for taking the time to read my job post!

title: Social Media Account Manager / Content Supervisor (Later + QA)
description:
Social Media Account Manager / Content Supervisor (Later + QA)



Part-Time | Long-Term | Philippines Only | $6–$10/hr



We are a fast-growing digital marketing agency working primarily with restaurant and hospitality brands. We’re looking for a detail-oriented Social Media Account Manager / Content Supervisor to oversee scheduling, accuracy, and quality control across multiple client accounts using Later.



This role is focused on reviewing and approving content before it goes live, ensuring every post follows brand guidelines and is scheduled correctly.



Responsibilities



You will be responsible for reviewing, managing, and approving scheduled social media content.



Core Responsibilities



Manage and oversee multiple restaurant social media accounts



Review all scheduled posts inside Later before publishing



Ensure all content follows each client’s brand guidelines



Verify:



Correct images/videos are used



Captions match the correct menu items



Promotions align with the correct days and times



Happy Hour, brunch, specials, and events are scheduled accurately



No outdated pricing, offers, or incorrect items are posted



Prevent mistakes such as:



Scheduling Happy Hour posts on non-Happy Hour days



Using the wrong image for a promotion or menu item



Incorrect dates, times, or offers



Coordinate with caption writers, editors, and supervisors



Flag issues before content goes live and request corrections



Maintain clean, organized content calendars



Report recurring issues or workflow gaps



This Role Is NOT



Content creation



Video editing



Graphic design



This is a quality control, review, and approval role.



Requirements



Strong experience using Later (REQUIRED)



Experience managing or supervising social media accounts



Restaurant or hospitality experience strongly preferred



Excellent attention to detail



Strong English reading and comprehension skills



Highly organized and process-driven



Comfortable managing multiple clients



Able to follow SOPs and brand guidelines precisely



Reliable internet and consistent availability



Long-term mindset



Bonus Skills



Experience working at a digital marketing agency



Familiarity with restaurant menus, promotions, and operations



Experience with content approval or QA workflows



Compensation



$6–$10 USD per hour (Part-Time)



Rate is based on experience, Later expertise, and accuracy level



Entry-level candidates will start toward the lower end



Higher rates reserved for candidates with proven restaurant + agency + Later experience



Opportunity for increased hours and rate as responsibilities grow



Please include your expected hourly rate when applying.



How to Apply



Please submit:



Your resume



A short description of your experience using Later



Examples of accounts or brands you’ve managed (if available)



Answers to the following:



How do you prevent scheduling mistakes before posts go live?



Have you managed restaurant accounts before?



How do you review content for multiple clients efficiently?



What tools have you used for scheduling and approvals?



Required Video Introduction (Important)



Please include a short video (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining:



Why you believe you are a strong fit for this role



How you ensure accuracy when managing multiple accounts



Important: Please mention “West Avenue Media” in your video so we know it was created specifically for this application.



Applications without a video may not be considered.

Qualified candidates may be asked to complete a short content review test to assess attention to detail and decision-making.

title: Senior Technical Solar Operations & Product Specialist (Technical Right Hand — Quality & Product Expertise)
description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a highly detail-oriented technical specialist to become the technical backbone of our solar operations.



ABOUT US: We are building an exciting solar technology platform to help our clients on their journey to reduce their energy costs. We are small team at present with 2 of our team also from the Philippines, but we plan to grow rapidly and need to build an exciting, passionate team.



This role exists to ensure every project is technically correct, clearly documented, and ready for smooth installation. You will work closely with sales, installers, and customer service to make sure the right products are selected, job packs are accurate, and technical details are never missed.



You will not be responsible for full system design from scratch. Instead, your role is to validate, refine, and optimise proposals created in OpenSolar.



You will play a key role in ensuring technical excellence and freeing up leadership to focus on growth.



Core Responsibilities



Technical Job Pack Ownership

- Review and refine job packs before installation.

- Ensure installers receive clear, detailed, and practical instructions.

- Identify missing details, risks, or inconsistencies.

- Improve job pack quality and technical clarity across all projects.

- Translate sales outcomes into installation-ready technical information.



OpenSolar Proposal Review & Technical Optimisation

Using OpenSolar, you will:

- Review proposals built by the team and ensure technical accuracy.

- Adjust configurations where needed to align with real-world installation requirements.

- Validate system sizing, product selection, and compatibility.

- Ensure pricing and technical recommendations align with customer needs.

- Work with sales to deliver technically sound solutions quickly.



This role focuses on technical oversight and optimisation rather than full system design.



Product Selection & Technical Expertise

A core part of this role is having an in-depth understanding of solar and battery products, knowing which solution suits which scenario.



Experience with products such as:

- Tesla Powerwall

- SunGrow

- GoodWe

- Selectronic

- Sigenergy

- RedEarth



You should understand:

- Which products suit different customer goals.

- Compatibility between inverters, batteries, and system layouts.

- Strengths and limitations of different brands.

- Practical installation considerations.



Installer Liaison & Technical Assurance

- Act as the technical bridge between office and field teams.

- Liaise with installers to confirm correct setup and execution.

- Answer technical questions and remove uncertainty before installation.

- Help maintain consistent installation standards.



Technical Support & Problem Solving

- Support customer service with technical troubleshooting.

- Help diagnose and resolve client issues efficiently.

- Communicate technical information clearly to non-technical people.

- Ensure customers receive confident and professional technical support.



Ideal Candidate

You are someone who:

- Naturally catches details others miss.

- Understands solar systems beyond software outputs.

- Knows how to choose the right product for the right scenario.

- Thinks practically about real-world installs.

- Enjoys improving systems and reducing mistakes.



Required Skills & Experience

- Strong experience using OpenSolar (reviewing and refining proposals).

- Solid understanding of solar + battery system operation.

- Deep knowledge of major inverter and battery ecosystems.

- Experience preparing or reviewing technical documentation/job packs.

- Ability to communicate effectively with installers and sales teams.

- Strong troubleshooting mindset.



Highly Desirable

- Hybrid or off-grid knowledge.

- Electrification knowledge (EV charging, heat pumps, etc.).

- Experience improving operational workflows.

- Field installation or commissioning experience.



Success in This Role Looks Like

- Job packs are extremely clear and detailed.

- Installers are confident and rarely need clarification.

- Product selections are optimised for each situation.

- Technical issues are solved quickly.

- Sales moves faster because technical decisions are validated early.



Who Will Thrive In This Role

We are looking for someone who genuinely enjoys technical accuracy and takes pride in getting things right the first time.



You will likely succeed in this role if you:

- Notice details that others miss.

- Think ahead and prevent problems before they happen.

- Care about quality and long-term outcomes — not just completing tasks.

- Enjoy improving systems and making things clearer and smoother.

- Are comfortable taking ownership rather than waiting for instructions.



This is not a role for someone who wants to simply follow a checklist.

It is a role for someone who wants to become the trusted technical right hand in a growing solar



Please watch the video below as it contains the instructions for the next step. Once you have completed it and passed the task, we will send you a link to schedule your interview. Thank you! 







Kindly
 your answers here:

title: Product Coordinator- Fashion Retail Industry
description:
Job Title: Product Coordinator

AU Business Hours (9:00 AM – 5:00 PM AEDT)

Employment Type: Full-Time



About the Role



We are seeking a detail-oriented and highly organized Product Coordinator to join our team. This role plays a critical part in managing product data, supporting inventory reporting, and ensuring seamless coordination across multiple departments including Sales, Finance, eCommerce, and Customer Service.



You will be responsible for maintaining data accuracy, supporting product lifecycle processes, and contributing to business insights through reporting and analytics.



Key Responsibilities:



Product Data & System Management

- Create and maintain product master data across internal systems (e.g., PLM, BI tools)

- Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and alignment with business frameworks

- Manage product lifecycle data including seasonality, collection setup, and program timelines

- Develop and distribute order forms for product programs and launches

- Collaborate with internal teams to ensure smooth execution of product programs



Inventory & Sales Data Support

- Maintain accurate inventory records and support stock management initiatives

- Generate regular inventory and sales reports (e.g., sell-through, stock on hand, weeks of cover)

- Assist with residual stock reporting and product performance analysis

- Provide insights and recommendations to improve efficiency and data accuracy



Global Product Setup & Coordination

- Support global product setup and ensure accurate system configuration prior to launches

- Manage updates related to product changes, cancellations, and program communications

- Assist in product-related reporting, wrap-ups, and cross-functional meetings



Skills & Experience:



Essential

- Strong attention to detail and data accuracy

- Excellent organizational and time management skills

- Ability to manage high volumes of data in a fast-paced environment

- Strong communication and stakeholder management skills

- Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint, Outlook)



Desirable

- Tertiary qualifications in Business, Finance, Commerce, or a related field

- Experience in retail, wholesale, or fashion industry environments

- Knowledge of data systems (e.g., PLM, SAP, BI tools)

- Analytical mindset with strong numerical and commercial awareness



What You’ll Bring

- A proactive and inquisitive approach to problem-solving

- Ability to meet deadlines and manage competing priorities

- Strong collaboration skills across cross-functional teams

- Interest in product, data, and commercial performance



Why Join Us?

- Collaborative and supportive team environment

- Opportunities for learning, development, and career growth

- Exposure to cross-functional business operations and analytics



To Apply:

- Share your most updated CV

- Answer the following questions in your application



1. Tell us about your experience working with product or inventory data.

Have you worked in a fashion, retail, or wholesale environment? If yes, please describe your role.



2. Describe a report you have built (e.g., inventory, sales, or performance).

What data did you use, what Excel functions/tools were involved, and how was the report used?



3. If you discovered errors or inconsistencies in product data that were already being used for reporting, how would you investigate and resolve the issue?



4. What systems or platforms have you used to manage product or inventory data (e.g., Excel, ERP, PLM, SAP)?



5. This role involves handling multiple deadlines (data updates, reporting, order forms).

How do you prioritise your work to ensure accuracy while meeting deadlines?

description:

The ideal candidate is confident on the phone, highly organized, and skilled at building rapport with homeowners and buyers. This role focuses on lead conversion, appointment setting, and CRM management to help drive sales growth for the team.



Key Responsibilities:



Lead Management

Appointment Setting

Execute consistent follow-up via calls, text messages, and
s.

CRM Management

Lead Conversion Tracking



Monitor and report key metrics such as:



Calls made



Contacts made

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
We are looking for a reliable, friendly, and proactive Customer Service Representative to handle customer inquiries for our 
 stores.

Your job is to provide excellent communication, solve customer issues, and ensure that every customer receives a smooth and positive experience.

The ideal candidate has strong customer service experience, communicates clearly, and works consistently every single day.



What is 
?


 is the largest online marketplace in the Netherlands and Belgium — similar to Amazon.

Thousands of sellers offer products on the platform, and customers expect fast communication, clear answers, and strong service. A Customer Service Representative on 
 handles questions about deliveries, returns, product information, complaints, refunds, and order status.



Responsibilities:

- Respond to customer messages daily with a friendly, clear, and professional tone.

- Handle questions about delivery times, product details, order issues, and returns.

- Process return requests and communicate with customers according to 
 guidelines.

- Collaborate with the team to solve complex or escalated issues.

- Use DeepL or similar AI translation tools to translate Dutch messages (if needed).

- Maintain accurate communication logs and follow internal procedures.

- Identify common issues and proactively suggest improvements.

- Work consistently 7 days a week, approximately 2 hours per day.

- Ensure all customer messages are answered within 
’s required response time.



Requirements:

- Strong English communication skills (spoken and written).

- Dutch language skills are a strong advantage, but not required.

- Proven experience in customer service (e-commerce experience preferred).

- Ability to use AI translation tools such as DeepL.

- Proactive, solution-oriented mindset.

- A real team player who communicates clearly with colleagues.

- High attention to detail and ability to follow guidelines exactly.

- Consistent daily availability (7 days per week).

- Experience with platforms like 
, Amazon, Shopify, or other marketplaces is a plus.

- Ability to remain calm, polite, and professional — even with difficult customers.

- Fast learner with the ability to adapt to new systems and instructions.



Additional Preferred Skills: (These help filter the best candidates for 
 customer service)

- Experience handling refunds, disputes, and escalations.

- Familiarity with European delivery services (PostNL, DHL, DPD, etc.).

- Basic understanding of order fulfillment or logistics.

- Ability to recognize patterns in customer complaints and report them.

- Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently.



Important Application Rule:

- Applications written or assisted by AI will be automatically rejected.

- Please write your application manually — AI-generated responses are easy to detect.

title: Direct Response Copy Specialist – Up to $4,000/Month
description:
Work Hours: Full-time, Mon–Fri, day shift



ABOUT US



Young Publisher | 



- We’re an international digital publishing company

- We've been hiring Filipinos for over 5 years

- We offer long-term roles

- We don't disappear, we pay on time



ABOUT THE ROLE



We’re looking for an experienced Direct-Response Copywriter who can:



- Take full ownership of performance-driven campaigns

- Write
s that get opened, read, and clicked

- Create stop-scrolling ads

- Craft persuasive copy that drives readers to act



This is a full-time role with clear growth opportunities. You’ll start with
s and ads, and as you prove yourself, move into sales pages and VSLs.



RESPONSIBILITIES



- Write broadcast
s and automated sequences

- Create Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Help produce ebooks and lead magnets using AI tools

- Progress into sales pages and VSL scripts for launches



BENEFITS



- Get direct feedback from an 8-figure copywriter: a serious opportunity to sharpen your skills fast.

- Get access to premium courses and AI communities. We invest in our team because we want long-term growth.

- We encourage AI tools — but only with strong critical thinking. This is not a beginner role.



ROLE SUMMARY



- Full-time (Mon–Fri, 8 AM - 5 PM PH Time)

- Long-term position with growth into sales pages and VSLs

- $2,000 – $4,000 USD per month, depending on experience

- Fully remote

- Reliable, on-time payments every two weeks via Wise



REQUIREMENTS



- At least 2 years of direct-response copywriting experience (not blog or content writing)

- Proven results: open rates, CTR, conversions, ROAS

- Experience writing for coaches, course creators, or info product businesses

- Native-level English for US, UK, or Australian audiences

- Strong understanding of hooks, emotional triggers, objection handling, and CTAs

- Experience with Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Ability to adapt to different brand voices

- Comfortable using AI tools with critical thinking

- Strong communication skills and independence

- Reliable, responsive, proactive, and coachable



HIRING PROCESS



#1: Paid test task

#2: Interview

#3: Paid test month at 50% salary



We’re looking for professionals who know their craft and want long-term growth.

/to/CZb9go1y

title: Online Solar Battery Technical Support Specialist
description:
About the Role

We are a growing solar battery installation company looking for a tech-savvy, customer-focused individual to join our remote support team. You will be the voice our customers hear when they need help getting their solar battery system up and running  from first-time app setup through to diagnosing system issues over the phone.



This is a fully online role. You will handle inbound support calls, video calls, and messages, guiding customers step by step through setup and troubleshooting from the comfort of your own home.



What You’ll Do

• Guide customers through app setup, account registration, and first-time configuration

• Set up and configure monitoring dashboards and system alerts

• Troubleshoot inverter and battery connectivity issues remotely

• Walk customers through system diagnostics over the phone

• Escalate complex faults to field technicians with clear, accurate notes

• Log and manage support tickets and keep customer records updated

• Follow up with customers to confirm issues have been resolved



Systems & Platforms You’ll Work With

You will provide technical support across the following solar battery platforms:

• GoodWe — SEMS Portal & GoodWe App

• SAJ — eSolar App & Online Portal

• ESY Sunny Home Manager



Full product training will be provided. Prior experience with any of these platforms is a strong advantage.



What We’re Looking For

• Experience with solar, battery storage, or electrical systems (preferred but not essential)

• Ability to explain technical concepts clearly and patiently to non-technical customers

• Strong phone manner — calm, clear, and professional

• Confident using smartphone apps on both iOS and Android

• Reliable home internet setup and a quiet, professional workspace

• Self-motivated with strong written communication skills

• Previous customer support or helpdesk experience is a bonus



What We Offer

• Fully remote role — work from home on a schedule that suits you

• Full onboarding and training across all our inverter and battery brands

• Opportunity to grow into senior support or field technician roles

• Friendly, supportive team environment

• Make a real difference helping families get clean energy working in their homes

title: Construction accounting position
description:
The Visture Promise



Visture Property Group is very unique. I encourage you to visit our website (
) and read the About Us section. One thing we want to be clear about is our values. Visture Property Group is unique because we’re a family business that cares about its clients. We don’t buy into the old adage of ‘tenant and landlord’. We view our tenants as clients and treat them as such. Every client is VIP at Visture Property Group. The Visture promise is also one of our core values.



*Professional Characteristics



Visture Property Group is growing very quickly and needs additional Accounting personnel.



We are searching for the right candidate to join our dynamic team at Visture Property Group as a Construction Accounting specialist. The right candidate for this position will be eager to learn and open to growing their knowledge Quickbooks and other associated and integrated software, client relations, construction and maintenance billing and payroll, and other office duties.



You must have a positive attitude and be solutions focused for client happiness and business success. This role is very autonomous and will afford you plenty of flexibility. However, you must be a self-starter and eager to improve yourself. You must be a decisive individual that can review the facts and make a decision and is willing to learn from your and our mistakes.



Responsibilities:



Accounting Description



The role of a Construction Accounting Clerk is to plan, set up, and organize, new clients and contracts.

Trace, log and register every penny from purchase order to customer payments.

Accurately prepare and verify invoice and Payrolls.

Reconciliate all necessary account

work with other accounting personnel

Other Tasks as required

Skills and qualifications

title: Social Media Manager (Etsy / Creative Audience)
description:
Social Media Manager (Etsy / Creative Audience)



We’re looking for someone who gets Etsy sellers.



Not just “social media experience”…

But someone who understands the mindset of a maker trying to turn creativity into income.



About Listadum



Listadum helps Etsy sellers improve their listings and grow their shop with clear, actionable insights.

No fluff. No overwhelm. Just what actually helps.

We work with thousands of sellers who care about their craft… but want help on the business side.



What you’ll do

Plan and publish content across:

Instagram (Reels + carousels)

TikTok

Pinterest (a plus)

Turn real Etsy problems into content:

“Why am I not getting sales?”

“Are my tags wrong?”

“What’s wrong with this listing?”



Create:

Short-form videos (Reels / TikTok)

Carousel posts

Simple visual ads



Work with us on:

Content ideas

Hooks

Messaging that actually resonates with sellers

Repurpose content across platforms

Test different angles and learn what performs



You might be a great fit if:



You’ve sold on Etsy (big plus)

OR you deeply understand Etsy sellers



You know what makes someone stop scrolling

You can write simple, clear, relatable copy (no corporate tone)

You think in hooks, not just posts

You care about what actually converts, not just likes



WHAT WE CARE ABOUT A LOT

Good taste

Understanding the audience

Being able to say something real

Consistency over perfection



BONUS

Experience with ads (Meta / TikTok)

Understanding of SEO / Etsy keywords



HOW TO APPLY

simple

relatable

clear

engaging short clips

educational content

ads

captions

cuts, zooms, pacing

light motion / visual elements

title: AI-Powered Video Editor
description:
About the Role



We're a fast-growing direct-to-consumer health and beauty brand selling to women in the UK and Australian markets. Our products are premium and results-driven, and our content needs to match.

We're hiring a Video Editor who thinks like a marketer, someone who understands why a video works, not just how to put one together. You will work with us on an hourly basis to start, with strong potential for a long-term ongoing role if you deliver results.

AI tools are a core part of our workflow. We use Higgsfield, Kling, and Veo3 (accounts provided) — and we expect you to know how to use them, or learn fast.

 

What You'll Be Doing



• Creating hyper-realistic UGC and short-form videos that feel native, authentic, and convert

• Building branded content that communicates our positioning with the right text overlays, audio, and visual identity

• Writing and improving scripts — understanding open loops, visualisation, and narrative structure to get the most out of every creative

• Developing strong hooks and multiple ad variations from a single brief

• Finding and creating relevant B-roll — both sourced and AI-generated

• Conducting market and competitor research to inform creative direction — not just executing briefs, but contributing ideas

• Receiving a script or concept and turning it into the best possible video, using your knowledge of direct response principles

• Running feedback loops — reviewing performance data, understanding what didn't work, and making smart iterations

 

Who We're Looking For



(Applications that don't meet these requirements won't be considered.)

• You have real portfolio work from DTC or e-commerce brands — and you're proud to share it

• You think like a marketer — you know what makes someone stop scrolling, feel something, and buy

• You know how to work with AI — Higgsfield, Kling, Veo3, or similar tools are already part of how you work

• You're proactive — you don't wait for instructions, you bring ideas and flag problems early

• You're fast — our testing pace is high and we need someone who can match it

• You're independent — you can take a brief, run with it, and deliver something great without hand-holding

• You understand direct response — hooks, benefit-driven scripts, open loops, CTAs, pattern interrupts

• You know how to close the feedback loop — you can look at performance data, understand what didn't land, and iterate

• Your English is advanced — clear, professional, and confident. Spanish is a plus.

• You're reliable — you do what you say, when you say it

 

Engagement Structure



This starts as an hourly contract on Upwork. We'll begin with a short paid test project to evaluate fit and output quality. If you deliver, this becomes an ongoing long-term collaboration with increasing scope and volume.

title: Call & Lead Generation Sales Executive — Business Development
description:
Call & Lead Generation Sales Executive (Business Development)



Company: VSF Marketing — Full-Service Digital Marketing Agency (Tampa, FL, USA)

Employment: Full-Time (40 hours/week) | Remote | Philippines-Based



ABOUT VSF MARKETING

VSF Marketing is a veteran-owned, family-operated full-service digital marketing agency based in Tampa Bay, Florida. With 20+ years of sales and marketing experience, we deliver WordPress websites, SEO, Google Ads (PPC), social media management,
 marketing, and complete marketing solutions for U.S. business owners across multiple industries.



We're growing fast and looking for a hungry, results-driven sales professional to join our team. This is NOT a virtual assistant role — this is a real sales position for someone who knows how to pick up the phone, have real conversations with business owners, and book qualified meetings.



YOUR #1 GOAL:

Book 15 qualified appointments per week (3 per day) with decision-makers — business owners, C-level executives, IT directors, and operations managers across the United States.



WHAT YOU'LL DO DAILY:

- Outbound Cold Calling — Make 80-100+ calls per day to U.S. business owners using our lead lists and CRM tools

- Lead Qualification — Use a consultative sales approach to identify prospects who genuinely need marketing help (budget confirmed, pain points identified, website reviewed)

- Appointment Setting — Book qualified discovery calls/meetings between prospects and our sales team

- Objection Handling — Confidently address common objections around marketing ROI, website costs, agency trust, "I already have a guy," and more

- CRM Management — Log every call, update lead status, track pipeline activity, and maintain clean data in our CRM system

- Follow-Up Sequences — Execute multi-touch follow-up via phone,
, and LinkedIn to nurture prospects

- Daily Reporting — Report on calls made, conversations had, appointments booked, and pipeline metrics



WHO YOU'LL BE CALLING:

- Business owners (small to mid-size) across the United States

- C-level executives — CEOs, CMOs, COOs of companies doing $500K-$10M+ in revenue

- IT directors and managers — Companies that need website and technology solutions

- Industry focus: Home services (HVAC, plumbing, roofing, electrical, landscaping), professional services (lawyers, accountants, consultants), medical/dental practices, real estate, construction



MUST-HAVE REQUIREMENTS:

1. Proven Cold Calling Experience — You've made high-volume outbound calls (80-100+/day) and can prove it with metrics

2. B2B Sales / Appointment Setting Track Record — You've booked qualified meetings, not just "transferred calls"

3. Perfect English Communication — Clear, professional, American-neutral accent. No language barrier.

4. Digital Marketing Knowledge — You understand SEO, PPC/Google Ads, social media marketing, and website development and can articulate their value

5. CRM Proficiency — Experienced with CRM tools (HubSpot, Salesforce, Apollo.io, GoHighLevel, or similar)

6. Objection Handling Skills — Comfortable handling pushback on price, trust, timing, and competition

7. Self-Motivated & Disciplined — Manage your time, hit your numbers, stay accountable

8. 40-Hour/Week Commitment — Full-time schedule aligned with U.S. Eastern Time business hours



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS (Big Plus):

- Experience selling digital marketing or agency services

- Familiarity with Sandler Sales Methodology or similar consultative selling frameworks

- Previous experience calling U.S. home services businesses

- Experience with Apollo.io, SEMrush, or similar sales/marketing intelligence tools

- LinkedIn outreach experience



WEEKLY PERFORMANCE TARGETS:

- Outbound Calls: 400-500+

- Meaningful Conversations: 40-60

- Qualified Appointments Booked: 15

- Show Rate: 80%+

- CRM Updated & Clean: 100%



WHAT "QUALIFIED" MEANS AT VSF:

Every appointment must meet these criteria — no junk meetings:

- Decision-maker confirmed (owner or someone who can say "yes")

- Budget discussed (services start at $2,500+)

- Website reviewed and opportunities identified

- Real marketing pain point (no leads, bad website, wasting money on ads)

- Specific date/time confirmed for meeting



WHAT WE OFFER:

- Competitive base salary with performance bonuses

- Full-time, stable employment — not project-based

- Training, scripts, objection-handling guides, and ongoing coaching

- Growth opportunity — senior sales, team lead, or account management

- Professional tools provided — CRM, dialer, lead lists, marketing collateral

- Great team culture — small, tight-knit team that rewards results

- 100% remote — quiet workspace and reliable internet required



TOOLS YOU'LL USE:

- CRM system (Accelo / Apollo.io)

- Phone dialer (RingCentral)

- Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Sheets)

- LinkedIn (research and outreach)

- SEMrush (prospect website research)

- Slack (team communication)



HOW TO APPLY:

In your application, please include:

1. Your experience with outbound cold calling (how many calls/day, in what industry)

2. Your appointment setting metrics (appointments/week, conversion rates)

3. A brief voice recording or video introduction (60-90 seconds) so we can hear your English communication skills

4. Your experience with CRM tools (which ones, how you used them)

5. Why you're the right person for this role



WARNING: Applications without a voice sample or specific sales metrics will not be considered.



VSF Marketing is a veteran-owned, family-operated business. We value integrity, hard work, and results. If you're ready to be part of something real — not just another VA gig — apply now.

title: Experienced Virtual Assistant – Airbnb & Property Management

required (UK time zone).

title: Appointment Setter (Staffing/Recruitment Background Required) – UK & US Market
description:
Job Title: Appointment Setter (Staffing/Recruitment Background Required) – UK & US Market



Location: Remote (Philippines)

Experience: 3+ Years

Industry Requirement: Recruitment / Staffing Agency (Mandatory)



About the Company



We are a fast-growing offshore technology services company helping UK and US businesses build and scale high-performing remote engineering teams. We specialize in providing vetted software developers, technical talent, and dedicated offshore teams.



Role Overview



We are looking for a high-performing Appointment Setter with a proven background in staffing or recruitment agencies. This role is focused on outbound prospecting to decision-makers in the US and UK markets, introducing our services, and booking qualified sales meetings.



IMPORTANT: This role is strictly for candidates with prior experience in a staffing, recruitment agency, or talent solutions environment.



Key Responsibilities:



Execute outbound prospecting via cold calls, LinkedIn, and
 targeting US/UK clients

Leverage prior staffing/recruitment experience to confidently position talent solutions

Engage founders, CEOs, CTOs, and HR leaders

Qualify leads based on hiring needs, urgency, and fit (tech/startup focus)

Book qualified meetings for the sales team

Maintain accurate CRM records, call notes, and follow-ups

Consistently hit weekly/monthly meeting targets

Nurture leads and re-engage inactive prospects



Must-Have Qualifications (Strict Requirements):



3+ years of outbound B2B sales / SDR / appointment setting experience

Proven experience working in a staffing agency, recruitment firm, or RPO environment (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

Experience selling or supporting staffing, recruitment, or talent solutions services

Exposure to US or UK market outreach

Strong understanding of hiring processes, talent needs, and client acquisition in staffing

Excellent English communication and objection-handling skills

Experience using CRM and outbound tools (e.g., LinkedIn, dialers, sequencing tools)

Ability to work US business hours



Considerations: 



Experience in IT/Tech staffing or offshore hiring models

Background in SaaS, startups, or tech sales

Familiarity with AI-powered outreach tools

Experience in lead nurturing and reactivating stalled opportunities



What We’re Looking For



Candidates who have sold or supported staffing/recruitment services—not just general sales

Strong hunters who are comfortable with outbound activity

Individuals who understand how to speak with hiring managers and decision-makers

Self-driven professionals who thrive in a remote, target-driven environment



Kindly fill up the form to proceed with your application:

title: Zoho Developer – Deluge (Work-From-Home)
description:
Company: 

We are an MSP (Managed Service Provider) in Australia, delivering comprehensive IT support services, including Microsoft 365 management, Cyber Security Essentials, networking, routers, and general IT infrastructure. We also operate as a channel partner for Optus, providing telco services, router procurement, and configuration, with exposure to data center environments. In addition, we deliver CRM solutions (Zoho) and custom development services.



Role Overview:

We are seeking a highly skilled Developer with expertise in Zoho platforms, Deluge scripting to design, develop, and optimize end to end business workflow. The ideal candidate will have experience in customizing Zoho applications, integrating third-party APIs, and building scalable solutions to enhance business processes.



---Key Responsibilities---



Zoho Development & Customization:

Develop and customize Zoho CRM, Zoho Creator, Zoho Books, and other Zoho applications using Deluge scripting and workflows.

Build and manage Zoho integrations with third-party applications (e.g., Xero, Microsoft 365, payment gateways).

Automate workflows and processes to improve business efficiency.



Database & API Integration:

Design and manage database structures (SQL, NoSQL) for efficient data storage and retrieval.

Develop and manage RESTful APIs to connect Zoho applications with other platforms.

Ensure data security and compliance with best practices.



Technical Support & Maintenance:

Troubleshoot and resolve Zoho platform issues, performance bottlenecks, and integration challenges.

Perform regular system updates, debugging, and performance optimization.

Work closely with business teams to gather requirements and provide technical solutions.



---Required Skills & Experience---



Zoho Development:

Experience with Zoho Creator, Zoho CRM, Zoho Books, Zoho One.

Understanding of Deluge scripting and Zoho API integrations.



Full Stack Development is a plus

Proficiency in Java, JavaScript, Python, Node.js, or other backend technologies.

Front-end experience with React, Angular, or Vue.js.

Knowledge of SQL/NoSQL databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB).

Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud)



----Soft Skills---

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Excellent communication and documentation skills.



---Preferred Qualifications---

Certifications in Zoho Creator, Zoho CRM, or Java development.

Experience with automation, business process optimization, and ERP integrations.

Familiarity with Agile development methodologies.

title: Social Media Manager (Instagram & TikTok) for Ace & Taylor
description:
About Us

Ace & Taylor is a fast-growing D2C e-commerce brand selling premium hair tools across Europe. We focus on high-performing short-form video content and daily organic posting on Instagram and TikTok to grow brand awareness, trust, and sales.



We are currently active in The Netherlands and Belgium and expanding across Europe.



What You’ll Do (Your Core Responsibility)

You will fully own our organic social media presence on Instagram and TikTok.

This means you are responsible for planning, posting, captions, stories, community management (DMs & comments), and daily execution.



This is NOT just scheduling content.

We are looking for someone who can run our social media channels independently and consistently.



Your Weekly Tasks

- Post 1–2 times per day on Instagram & TikTok

- Create strong captions & CTAs (engaging, on-brand, conversion-focused)

- Post daily stories (product usage, UGC, behind the scenes, promos)

- Reply to DMs & comments within 24 hours

- Plan and manage the content calendar

- Repurpose existing videos into social posts

- Coordinate with video editors & creative team

- Track basic performance (views, engagement) and report weekly



We Are Looking For Someone Who

- Has proven experience managing Instagram & TikTok for brands

- Understands short-form content and social media trends

- Can work independently without daily hand-holding

- Is proactive: asks questions if something is unclear

- Is highly organized and consistent with daily posting

- Understands brand tone and can adapt copy per platform



Important (Read Carefully – This Filters Out 90% of Bad Applicants)

We post daily. This role requires consistency and ownership.

If you:

- Miss posting deadlines

- Are inconsistent

- Don’t reply to DMs/comments on time

- Don’t ask questions when confused

- Or treat this as “just scheduling posts”



This will clearly not be a fit.



Paid Test Task (Mandatory)

Before we hire you, we will ask you to complete a paid test task:

- Create a 7-day content plan

- Write captions for 5 posts

- Propose story ideas

This helps both sides see if we’re a good match.



Long-Term Opportunity

If this works well, this can become a long-term collaboration with consistent work, growing responsibility, and higher pay over time.

title: Email Automation Expert (Klaviyo and Shopify)
description:

To apply, send us a message and our Hiring Manager will quickly get back to you.



About Our Company

We're a 5-year-old e-commerce beauty brand doing $10M per year in Europe. We’re 20 employees and 3 of them work with e-mail campaigns, and now we want to hire one more to solely work on improving and revamping our automated e-mail marketing in Klaviyo.



Role Overview

You will own the
 automation end-to-end: from d
 the flows, building the flows, and improving the flows. You’ll have access to image designers, copywriters and localizers, to help you make the flows the best ones you’ve ever made for all of our 6 products.



Your Responsibilities

Re-build our e-mail marketing flows from scratch

Run A/B-test to identify the best performing
s

Maintain the flows and improve the content over time

Ensure we follow
 automation best practices

Increase the repurchase rate and lifetime value



The Requirements

Proven track record of improving similar brand’s
 marketing

Must be able to speak and write a professional level of English



As A Person You Are

You are reliable and accountable

You are detail-oriented & perfectionist



What We Offer The Right Person

What We Expect In Return

Practical information

title: Creative Strategist (Paid Ads) – Agent Taylor (Premium Hair Tools)
description:
About Us

Agent Taylor is a fast-growing D2C brand selling premium hair tools across Europe. We scale through high-performing direct response creatives on Meta & TikTok.



Your Role

Own the creative strategy for paid ads: research our target audience, define winning angles/hooks, write clear briefs for creators/editors, and iterate on what converts. This is strategy, not just ideas.



What You’ll Do



Translate customer insights into ad angles, hooks, and scripts



Build weekly creative briefs for UGC & ad variations



Analyze winners/losers and iterate fast



Align creatives with brand aesthetics (premium, trustworthy, native to TikTok/Meta)



Who We’re Looking For



Proven experience creating winning ad strategies for beauty/hair/skincare brands



Deep understanding of our target customer’s pains, desires, and triggers



Performance-minded (hooks, retention, proof, CTA)



Strong communicator with editors/creators



Bonus: you are part of the target audience and can deeply relate to the problem



Important

Fast testing environment. Missed deadlines, vague briefs, or ideas without data = not a fit.



Paid Test (Mandatory)

Short strategy task (angles + hooks for Agent Taylor) before hiring.



Long-Term

If it works: ongoing strategy ownership, weekly output, and growth in scope & pay.

title: Shopify Store Builder / Designer (Full-Time)
description:
Shopify Store Builder / Designer (Full-Time)



Fashion Dropshipping | Remote | High-Performance Team



We are looking for a highly skilled Shopify Store Builder / Designer to join our team full-time and play a key role in scaling our portfolio of fashion e-commerce brands.



We operate a fast-growing network of Shopify stores across Europe and the US, and we launch new stores every week. This role is focused on building high-converting, premium-looking stores at speed.



Your Role



As a Shopify Store Builder, you will be responsible for creating complete, ready-to-launch stores using our proven structure and systems.



You will:



Build ~3 Shopify stores per week using our internal templates and SOPs

Customize themes to match modern fashion brand standards

Create clean, premium, conversion-focused storefronts

Set up products, collections, navigation, and all core pages

Implement key apps and CRO elements

(reviews, upsells, bundles, size charts, trust elements)

Ensure each store meets our performance and design benchmarks

What We’re Looking For

Proven experience building Shopify stores

Strong experience in fashion / apparel e-commerce

A sharp eye for modern, premium design

Ability to work fast without compromising quality

Comfortable working independently in a high-output environment

Experience with themes such as Dawn, Prestige, Impulse

Basic knowledge of Liquid, CSS is a plus

Important



We are only considering candidates with relevant Shopify portfolio examples.



Your application must include:



Links to Shopify stores you have built

Examples of fashion or similar e-commerce brands



Applications without portfolio will not be reviewed.



Position Details

Full-time

Long-term opportunity

Fully remote

High-performance team environment

Clear output target: 3 stores per week

Why Join Us

Work on a large portfolio of fast-scaling brands

Clear systems and SOPs in place

Opportunity to grow with the company

How to Apply



Please send:



Your portfolio

Shopify stores you built

Your monthly rate

title: Virtual Assistent Google Merchant Center
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled and direct Google Merchant Center (GMC) specialist to quickly resolve a current account suspension and provide ongoing management of our product feed.



The Core Issue: Our GMC account is currently suspended due to a "Misrepresentation" policy violation. We need an expert who knows exactly what Google looks for to get the account reinstated immediately.



Key Responsibilities:



Resolve Misrepresentation: Audit our Shopify website and GMC account to ensure complete compliance. This includes finding and fixing discrepancies, such as ensuring our shipping times, return policies, and contact details on the store perfectly match the settings inside GMC.

Shopify API Feed Management: Manage and monitor our automated product feed connected via the Shopify API (Content API).

Ongoing GMC Maintenance: Regularly monitor the "Needs attention" tab to fix any disapproved items, policy violations, or warnings (such as missing GTINs, MPNs, or brand identifiers) before they impact performance.

Data Syncing: Ensure product data, pricing, and availability sync flawlessly between Shopify and Google without triggering new suspensions.



Requirements:



Proven, verifiable track record of successfully lifting GMC "Misrepresentation" suspensions.

Deep understanding of Google's strict Merchant Center policies.

Hands-on experience managing automated Shopify-to-Google API connections.

No fluff—we need someone who is straight to the point, identifies the problem, and fixes it.



How to Apply:

When applying, please start your message with the word: BLUE APPLE and end it with: ORANGE BANANA.



Also use at least 5 AP to apply.



We use this to filter out spam.

title: Commercial Assistant - Construction
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

We are a UK based construction and refurbishment company looking for a detail focused Commercial Assistant to support our commercial team with cost control, procurement administration, and reporting.

This is a process driven, spreadsheet based role, ideal for someone with experience supporting estimators, quantity surveyors, or construction commercial teams.

This role does not require commercial decision making. Your focus will be on accuracy, consistency and organised reporting, supporting the UK team so they can focus on delivery and commercial decisions.

This is a long term position, not a short term gig.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Measurement & Take Off Support

• Measure quantities from PDF construction drawings

• Prepare and update basic Bills of Quantities (BOQs)

• Revise quantities as drawings or scope change

Cost Plan & CVR Support

• Maintain live Excel based cost plans

• Update budgets vs actuals vs forecasts

• Input subcontractor pricing and cost changes

• Update monthly CVR (Cost Value Reconciliation) templates

• Highlight cost variances for review

Procurement Administration

• Issue enquiry
s to subcontractors (templates provided)

• Chase outstanding quotations

• Prepare comparison spreadsheets

• Log and track received pricing

Commercial Administration

• Maintain variation logs

• Track site instructions and variation order status

• Organise subcontractor documentation and pricing records

• Keep project files structured and up to date

 

ESSENTIAL SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

Please apply only if you have experience supporting construction or commercial teams.

• Previous experience supporting one or more of the following:

o Construction estimators

o Quantity surveyors

o Commercial managers

o Construction project teams

• Strong Excel skills (cost plans, formulas, structured spreadsheets)

• Ability to read and interpret construction drawings

• High attention to detail and accuracy

• Excellent written English

• Comfortable following instructions, templates and processes

• Reliable internet connection and home working setup

 

DESIRABLE (NOT ESSENTIAL)

• Experience with UK construction projects

 

WORKING STYLE & EXPECTATIONS

• Process led work using standard templates

• Clear weekly priorities and deliverables

• Regular check ins with the Commercial Manager

• Structured pilot period at the start

• Long term opportunity for the right person

 

WHY WORK WITH US

• Stable, long term role (not project or gig based)

• Clear scope and expectations

• Supportive management and structured processes

• Opportunity to grow responsibility as systems develop

title: Online English Teachers (Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency
